Chapter 1948: Chapter 1948 - 1084: Lord of Yangyang Faces Death, Su Lin Slaughters Hundred Stars! (Part 2)
============================================================

Afterward, his flesh, Origin, and Soul Spirit became unstable and trembled under the terrifying gaze. When the Wolf Lord gently placed a white Wolf Claw on his head, everything abruptly disintegrated from instability.

It’s over!

The Lord of Yangyang, at this initial stage of Half-step Forbidden, doesn’t even have the qualification to confront the Wolf Lord directly.

Because, to say nothing else, the power of the Wolf Lord’s body and Qi-Blood surpasses his understanding!

The Lord of Yangyang had never seen much, with the strongest he’d seen being only the concealed power of the Red Sun Emperor and Sun Empress!

Thus, the strength and oppressive terror of the Wolf Lord’s body exceeded all his knowledge.

However, Su Lin didn’t completely obliterate him but instead caused his Soul Spirit, Origin, and flesh to disintegrate. After suppressing and imprisoning them separately, he tossed them into the Origin Space.

After all, if the Wolf Pack Civilization truly won this unprecedented victory in the Wangshu Zone, then the system of three suns in the sky should advance again!

There could even be a Level 5 Sin Star within the Sky Wolf System?

With such thoughts, after Su Lin suppressed the Lord of Yangyang, he let out a long howl, signaling the three main armies to quickly sweep the battlefield and purge the remaining constant stars and small constant stars.

Only Level 2 and First Level Life Planets were left!

This could also be considered as leaving a seed in this starry sky, so the Wolf Pack Civilization wouldn’t truly eradicate everything!

And Su Lin himself went straight for the next star.

For now, almost two thousand years had passed, and battle reports from the Southernmost Land were as dense as snowflakes.

What kind of existence is the Roach Emperor?

An arrogant Emperor who knows nothing of surrender, nothing of fear!

When the Undying Cockroach Army Group under its command urgently sent out signals for support so densely, it meant they couldn’t hold out much longer.

So Su Lin had to quickly sweep through the remaining stars and small stars of the Hundred Stars Alliance.

He truly wanted to weaken the Undying Cockroach Army Group once again, but he didn’t want to truly cripple this army group completely!

After all, this is a Star Sky Insect Clan with infinite potential!

Due to his own ambition and carelessness, the Charm Fox and Phantom Army have already been wasted; Su Lin doesn’t wish for the Roach Emperor and Undying Cockroach Army Group to repeat this path!

Moreover, the Roach Emperor is not the Charm Fox. If she is defeated, she’s destined to fall in battle!

This made Su Lin let out a long howl, demonstrating overwhelming might, breaking through several Small Star Defense Arrays alone!

The foundation of small stars used by Heavenly Venerate bodies couldn’t withstand even a millionth of Su Lin’s power, how could they withstand his attack?

Even though they’ve gathered the Power of All Living Beings upon them, it’s still the same!

After breaking through, Su Lin directly refined them into his Celestial Wolf Wings!

Now the Celestial Wolf Wings, filled with so much Star Energy and Power of All Living Beings, can almost instantly transform into Star River Wings, nearly covering a range of several light-years.

And these small stars and stars truly became embellishments upon his wings.

With more and more refined into it, it seems like this is truly forming a small cosmos.

Even the living beings refined into it have survived.

This feels like a miracle!

Living beings compressed and refined in small stars still live?

Does this not suggest that Su Lin can recreate a small cosmos with a thought, or even change the cosmos?

Dimensional Truth can achieve this!

But such a miraculous feat capable of changing the cosmos could only be done by the fabled full-powered Forbidden Giant.

And now, this entire explanation seems only explainable by the fragments of the starry sky remnants Su Lin has heard in the void.

"Is this the Heavenly Boundary path that needs to be filled? It actually requires creating a cosmos, which seems to align in a different way with the Atomic Level self-proven Forbidden! Come! I want to see how many paths there are to advance into Forbidden?"

At this time, while refining, Su Lin not only witnessed this nearly miraculous scene but also once again heard the starry sky remnants in the void, yet he didn’t care!

He is eager to see how fantastic and wondrous this path can be!

Now his Celestial Wolf Wings can even nourish living beings,

This is tantamount to him having the support of all living beings from a miniature cosmos, also equaling having a storage space even more vast than the Origin Space.

No wonder the Peng Emperor could sway the foundation of the Purple Brilliance Star Core by taking this path.

Perhaps the small cosmos created by the Peng Emperor to extend his Heavenly Boundary journey is already extremely vast!

Boom!

At this moment, Su Lin has become cold and ruthless to the extreme!

The original rule of surrendering to the Wolf Pack Battle Banner if not lowered for three months has turned into one where those not surrendering immediately upon the Wolf Lord’s arrival are exterminated directly, with the stars refined into the body!

Such means, extremely ruthless.

The Wolf Pack Civilization even blocked the news of the vanquishing of the Lord of Yangyang, Hundred Stars Godslaying Army, and all the elites of the Hundred Stars Alliance!

Survival is the instinct of many species; not everyone can stand united against external enemies.

Even under the bloody infamous name of the Wolf Pack Civilization, many planets don’t even dare to put up symbolic resistance.

Throughout the range of the Hundred Stars Alliance, about thirty stars and over two hundred small stars directly surrendered before the Wolf Pack Civilization even arrived.

This made the Wolf Pack Civilization obliged to accept.

Because ultimately, the Wolf Pack Civilization is not the chaotic and vicious bandits like the Sea of Star Sand, they have their own principles and integrity!

Yet, the vast starry sky is boundless; to push through the remaining territories of the Hundred Stars Alliance took another full three hundred years of time.

In those three hundred years, Su Lin refined more than thirty stars and over a hundred small stars into his body again; he could feel the new cosmos nurturing inside him becoming increasingly complete, with the survival rate of living beings refined into the Sky Wolf System also rising.

From total annihilation to becoming Undead in the beginning, to having living beings surviving halfway, albeit not lasting long, to now, all living beings can survive.

However, from the moment all living beings are refined into his Celestial Wolf Wings, their ceiling is also set, unable to break through again.

This means that Su Lin’s self-created Star River Wings are still not perfect!

He indeed felt the eleventh Heavenly Boundary Mark on the Star River Wings!

But this eleventh Heavenly Boundary Mark remains ethereal, like a flower in the mirror, a moon in the water.

Just like the Star River Wings he created, although they seem to exist, the living beings within cannot ascend, break through, or reproduce, as if they were forcibly imprinted molds.

It is still just a form, and Su Lin can feel this Star River Wings continuously absorbing vast energy from within to nourish itself, much more than any of the other ten Heavenly Boundary Marks, exceeding by a thousandfold, even ten thousandfold!

If he can’t perfect it, even with Su Lin’s vastly superior energy for his level, it can only collapse and disperse, turning into scattered Star Energy and Power of All Living Beings.

Much like a "Nightmare," while it might still amplify battle strength, it can’t reach the unparalleled force of the Peng Emperor, capable of shaking a Star Core to its foundation!

......

Standing in front of Meng Hu, observing with an icy, indifferent demeanor as if looking at a corpse, without a trace of emotional fluctuation.

The intense aura of danger instantly enveloped the entire body of the Invincible Fierce Tiger, causing it to take a deep, shocking breath, as if at this moment, he was the fish on the chopping block under the White Wolf’s knife, nearly shattering Meng Hu’s mental state. The Invincible Fierce Tiger couldn’t understand why the White Wolf didn’t kill him outright; instead, it expended energy to bring him back from the ice to the Land of Adventure. This fear of the unknown surged up in Meng Hu’s heart, but at this moment, in his weakened state, he had no power to resist, even though internally he was in panic. In the Land of Adventure, the domain of the White Wolf, it was to no avail.

Su Lin scrutinized Meng Hu before him, like a lofty master examining a slave brought back, his eyes filled with disregard.

Chapter 1949: Chapter 1949 - 1085: Three Taboo Paths, the Roach Emperor’s Battle to the Death!
============================================================

"Seventy stars and several star systems, along with hundreds of small stars, and still unable to successfully connect this eleventh path of the Heavenly Boundary. Could it really be, as the remnant whispers of the starry sky suggest, a road of no return?"

At this moment, Su Lin, feeling the incredible transformation within, couldn’t help but doubt whether the path of the Peng Emperor could truly be walked!

In such a situation, even Su Lin couldn’t perfect the Star River Wings, nor connect the eleventh Heavenly Boundary Mark. Who else could achieve this?

Must it be done like the Peng Emperor’s body transformed from the White Cloud, refining a Level 5 Peak existence, or even an ultimate system of a Little Star Core into one’s body?

Not to mention whether it can be done!

Even if it could be achieved, it would be a Level 5 Peak or the ultimate system of a Little Star Core!

Even a newly emerging Level 5 Peak system like the Red Sun Empire can, within two eras, nurture an army of hundreds of millions of billions, and breed several half-step Taboos, even producing existences like the Red Sun Emperor, who are just a step away from breaking into Taboo.

So, is connecting the Heavenly Boundary path truly worth it?

No wonder the remnants of the starry whispers say the Heavenly Boundary path is broken!

The Ten Heavens of the Heavenly Boundary are the end, and beyond that, one can only take the Dimension Road!

"Hahaha, enough, perhaps this path is not meant for me! Even if my heart is like cold iron, in the end, I cannot sever the last ties; the Wolf Pack Civilization and I must have our limits!"

Just upon rising the intention of targeting other stars and small stars, Su Lin shook his head and gave up.

After all, life is short, and one must hold firm to certain principles and beliefs.

Otherwise, without any conviction, changing course constantly, the Wolf Pack Civilization is destined to crumble slowly.

Su Lin’s mindset could not achieve today’s clarity and unwavering determination.

After dismissing this thought, Su Lin no longer considered remaking the taboo path of the Heavenly Boundary.

Because even without this path, he still has the atomic-level self-proving path, and the Dimension Road.

Both paths can continue to ascend.

Moreover, reviving the Heavenly Boundary path involves too much slaughter, filled with blood and sin, a thorough road of no return.

As Su Lin’s thoughts returned, his loud shout signaled the three military groups to swiftly clean the battlefield.

He himself tore through time and space, rushing towards the southern starry sky of the Sky Wolf System.

For there awaited another equally intense super battle.

......

And as the Wolf Lord left this battlefield,

the outcome of the battle between the Hundred Stars Alliance and the Wolf Pack Civilization had already swept rapidly across the entire Wangshu Zone.

"The three main armies of the Wolf Pack Civilization have utterly defeated the Hundred Stars Alliance, leaving a bloodbath over a hundred light-years!"

"Lord of Yangyang has fallen! The Hundred Stars Godslaying Army has been annihilated!"

"Seventy percent of the elite troops of the Yangyang Army and the Hundred Stars’ various ace forces have perished, with thirty percent becoming the Wolf Pack’s minions. Currently, ninety percent of the Hundred Stars Alliance’s territories have fallen, with only the Yangyang Stellar System still holding firm!"

"The Hundred Stars Alliance has suffered a massive defeat! After this single battle, it will withdraw from the stage of contention in the Wangshu Zone!"

.....

We can say that as news flies, the entire Wangshu Zone has been stirred.

Because even if the Hundred Stars Alliance is weak, it has long been a major power in the Wangshu Zone, its combined size comparable to a Great Clan of the Star Nebula.

Even the Sea of Star Sand dared not plunder the Hundred Stars Alliance in the past, yet now, in a single battle, ninety percent is lost!

The alliance leader is dead!

All elite ace forces of the alliance are dead!

The legendary invincible Hundred Stars Godslaying Army is dead!

Such an outcome was caused by just the three main armies of the Wolf Pack Civilization; it’s simply unbelievable.

Therefore, all forces that originally dismissed the Wolf Pack Civilization have now fully focused their attention.

At this moment,

even Qing Ming above the Golden Sun Star System, upon hearing this battle report, showed a complicated expression in her transformed cool eyes.

"The three military groups, with merely a military force of some sixty trillion, truly transformed the Hundred Stars Alliance into this state within just over two thousand years of war capability? Is the war capability of the Wolf Pack Civilization truly this formidable?"

Qing Ming mumbled to herself as she felt the battle report.

The last time she visited the Sky Wolf System to deliver the Squad Leader’s Heavenly Order, she deeply felt the gap between the current Wolf Lord and herself.

This is no longer the Lord of Small Stars she once condescended over, but a true colossal Emperor.

His every word and deed could now influence the situation in a region.

Even the Squad Leader had to offer unimaginable costs and resources to invite the Wolf Pack Civilization to action.

Even though inviting the Wolf Pack Civilization, all that was promised was to thwart the Bright Day System, without specifying how to thwart it!

They became the most unique existence among the "Unmentionable" investors.

Not only had the Wolf Lord long repaid the "Unmentionable" debt, accomplished life-or-death tasks superbly, but also because as "Unmentionable" weakens, its restrictions on investors become increasingly limited.

Especially now, with most of "Unmentionable’s" power entangled in star core conflicts, unable to spare attention to the Wolf Lord and the Wolf Pack Civilization.

This made the Wolf Lord exhibit a tendency of complying with orders without following commands, yet neither the Squad Leader nor Qing Ming could do anything.

They could only offer great rewards!

Still, Qing Ming felt that the Squad Leader’s great rewards were futile!

Giving the tremendous opportunity originally meant for her to the Wolf Lord, fearing it would only nurture the Wolf Pack Civilization to the point of being capable of slaying the master!

Chapter 1950: Chapter 1950 - 1085: Three Taboo Paths, Roach Emperor’s Desperate Battle! (Part 2)
============================================================

Therefore, in some indignation and anxiety, Qing Ming not only transmitted all the intelligence of the Wolf Pack Civilization to the Squad Leader on the Star Core, but also once again took it upon herself to send detailed information about the Wolf Pack Civilization, as well as the overwhelming combat power data displayed by the Wolf Lord in the Battle of the Sea of Star Sand, to the High Priest of the Black Sun Constant Star!

Perhaps in the Wangshu Zone, no one knows exactly how strong that High Priest is, but "Unspeakable" knows.

He is a guy who followed the same path as Blazing Flame Ink but failed in proving the taboo,

he considers himself a pitiable creature.

But even as a pitiable creature, he almost created a legendary double taboo verification with Blazing Flame Ink.

So Qing Ming wanted to see how this unpredictable Wolf Lord and the Wolf Pack Civilization would fare against the subconscious Black Sun Stellar Army’s strategies.

Qing Ming’s actions, if discovered by other forces, might be incomprehensible!

But only those who have truly witnessed the growth trajectory of the Wolf Lord can understand why Qing Ming feels uneasy and fearful!

In Qing Ming’s eyes, the threat level posed by the Wolf Pack Civilization even surpasses that of the Bright Day System!

After all, the Bright Day System is strong because of its deep foundation, which has been strong for countless Eras!

But the Wolf Pack Civilization is unreasonably strong!

It rose from a minor planet, fighting bloodily all the way to the present, in just a few tens of thousands of years!

Even after countless reviews, Qing Ming asks herself and knows no one could have achieved such achievements.

So what is a variable?

This is it!

The Wolf Pack Civilization is a variable!

No one dares to speculate about its future!

But ultimately, Qing Ming is unwilling to let the Wolf Pack Civilization easily obtain the overwhelming fortune that was originally hers, for which she has paid too much!

Only if the Wolf Pack Civilization is defeated can she preserve her fortune!

As for whether the defeat of the Wolf Pack Civilization would affect the Squad Leader and "Unspeakable’s" overall plan, Qing Ming has no time to think much further.

But she knows that if the Wolf Pack Civilization wins, not only will she lose her fortune, but she is destined for a bad end.

...

And just as the entire Wangshu Zone was collapsing with the fall of the Hundred Stars Alliance,

the southern Star Sky of the Wolf Pack Civilization had also fallen by a full eighty percent!

Every inch of land, soaked in blood!

The war in the southern Star Sky perfectly exemplified this saying.

Here, the sky was covered with corpses, spread throughout the starry sky.

Most of the corpses here were from the Undying Cockroach Army Group, but there were also many from the Black Sun Stellar System.

At this time, the Black Sun Star Lord amid the army was severely injured,

With a small part of his skull bitten off from his forehead, brain matter could be seen churning, and his chest had multiple wounds where sharp blades had pierced.

These wounds all exuded an extremely intense "Arrogant" momentum and a sinful True Intent aiming to corrode everything!

This was collected from the Sinners Army after they perished in the thirty-sixth checkpoint of the Sea of Star Sand.

At that time, the Sin Extinction Array in the thirty-sixth checkpoint was about to activate, but it was dissolved by the Illusion God, yet a portion of the sinful True Intent entered the Formation Diagram, and another part was intercepted by the Roach Emperor.

"Haha, good! Very good! Even I got injured at the origin by that cockroach, it seems I underestimated the Wang Shu Heroes being confined in the far south!"

Within the vast military formation, the Black Sun Star Lord expressed his intense anger and also amusement through his spiritual will.

Because it seemed that during these thousands of years, the Black Sun Stellar System was on the verge of completely conquering the southern Star Sky of the Sky Wolf System.

But just not long ago, a highly fragile Star Sky Insect Clan, which had even yet not broken through a hundred billion ancestor-level military power, taught him a deeply profound lesson.

They nearly devoured him alive!

It was fantastical and unbelievable!

Even after the ongoing war, the Black Sun Star Lord was somewhat unsure how this Star Sky Insect Clan, which originally only followed their nature and genetic control, had fought fiercely against him till now?

It seemed this Star Sky Insect Clan was completely different from other Star Sky Insect Clans!

Not only did they follow unified commands and orders without deviation, but they also formed gigantic Super Fortune Arrays consisting of hundreds of billions!

Moreover, this Undying Cockroach Army Group fearless of death and used every possible extreme tactic, which was terrifyingly dirty!

Disguise, slay, assassinate, trap, self-destruct, advance when the enemy retreats, and harass when the enemy advances!

This led the Black Sun Stellar Army to feel as though they were facing not Star Sky Insect resistance, but a band of starry sky bandits with unified commands!

This opened the eyes of the Black Sun Stellar Army.

Furthermore, what drove them to madness and rage was a grand decisive battle that this Star Sky Insect Clan stirred up not long ago!

However, hidden within this grand decisive battle was actually an ambush aimed at the Black Sun Star Lord.

In that battle, the Insect Queen of the Undying Cockroach Army Group reappeared, having absorbed a great deal of sinful energy, she nearly reached a half-step taboo prowess.

Still, what was most fatal was that while the Black Sun Stellar Army was being held back, nearly a hundred billion Heavenly Boundary strong army suddenly emerged inexplicably.

All of them headed to hunt the Black Sun Star Lord!

Even if the Black Sun Star Lord’s combat power was against the heavens, capable of shaking a Stellar Dome, he could not break through and eliminate the siege and suppression from nearly a hundred billion Heavenly Boundary strong army.

Because nearly a hundred billion Heavenly Boundary strong army can besiege even a quasi-taboo!

Even a taboo existence stepping on a Fate Altar would have to consider the backlash of Sinful Karma Fire and the judgment from Starry Sky Will when attempting to annihilate the nearly hundred billion Heavenly Boundary strong army, questioning whether his Fate Altar beneath could remain firm as a rock?

Thus, the Black Sun Star Lord suffered significant severe injuries in that battle, and if not for the intervention of the High Priest and the group of hidden guards trained under him, he indeed would have been overturned in a ditch!

Moreover, he also learned from the High Priest that the Wolf Lord was on his way!

This made the Black Sun Star Lord no longer eager to advance rapidly but instead wished to completely eradicate this Star Sky Insect Clan and the Insect Queen!

Since a decisive battle anywhere is a battle, if the Wolf Lord wants to save this Star Sky Insect Clan, then fight here!

No problem!

The Black Sun Stellar System, wanting to explore beyond the extreme south, always required a face-off against the Wolf Pack Civilization!

Moreover, the shame of the siege on the Black Sun Star Lord also requires the blood of the Insect Queen to wash away!

...

Su Lin looked pleased at the swift and orderly movement of the Wolf Pack before him. This was his most satisfactory contingent under his command, and it would be his best support in battles to come. Only as the wolf pack under his command became more excellent could he fight enemies without worries,

wolves, after all, are pack animals, and he has no intention of being a Lone Wolf.

Next, Su Lin opened his mouth and howled loudly toward the distant north, signaling the Wolf Clan to leave the ice and return to the Land of Adventure together, ensuring their prey remained unseen by the Hunters along the way.

The Wolf Clan received the command, responded with high-pitched howls, and then dashed away, speeding along the path they came from, seemingly exerting every effort to let the Wolf King see their remarkable speed and strength.

Looking at the high-spirited Wolf Pack, Su Lin felt even more determined to lead the Wolf Pack to dominate the Arctic. During the Ice Age, with everything evolving, only growth in strength is the sole survival law, or one would become preyed upon by others, a conclusion Su Lin refuses to accept!

Su Lin observed the two Beta Wolves behind the Little Lone Wolf carrying the remaining meat of the Invincible Fierce Tiger, their steps no longer as agile as before, knowing naturally that this was a test set up by the Little Lone Wolf for them. As Beta Wolves of the team, they should have the charisma and courage to stand on their own, so Su Lin said nothing.

The Little Lone Wolf came before Su Lin, let out a low "howl," and Su Lin understood its meaning.

Chapter 1951: Chapter 1951 - 1086: The Roach Emperor in Desperation, Reinforcements from the Four Great Military Groups!
============================================================

The Black Sun Star Army currently has over sixty trillion Sin Army and over twenty trillion dependents, advancing inch by inch with a highly organized formation.

This is the best method the Black Sun Star Army has derived through bloodshed during this time.

Only by pushing forward inch by inch can this Undying Cockroach Army Group be completely annihilated.

Otherwise, they would resurrect like an untamed wildfire, endlessly harassing the rear lines.

In such a sweeping advance by the Black Sun Star Army, the remaining Undying Cockroach Army Group has already surrounded the last small constant star in the southern region of the Sky Wolf System.

This is the last stronghold of the Undying Cockroach Feudal Town!

If this place cannot hold, the entire Undying Cockroach Army Group Feudal Town will be considered completely lost!

Originally emanating an arrogant aura, the Roach Emperor now appears dispirited, with numerous injuries.

The injuries on her body are far more terrifying than those of the Black Sun Star Lord. Even the Roach Emperor has been eroded by Sin’s True Intent, which cannot be removed no matter what.

This renders the Roach Emperor unable to ascend further, despite her aura reaching the tenfold Ultimate Heaven and possessing a soul bone forming.

These Sin Truths are about to turn the Roach Emperor into a Sin Puppet!

"How much do we have left?"

At this moment, the dispirited Roach Emperor’s eyes have completely turned blood-black.

Even a demonic aura not belonging to the Roach Emperor frequently flashes in her eyes, indicating that she is nearing loss of control!

Everything about her now is sustained by her unparalleled willpower and resilience!

The Roach Emperor is arrogant, never bowing her head!

In the Serpent Civilization, she stood on equal footing with the Serpent Emperor.

In the Wolf Pack Civilization, she was the most formidable and unmatched War Emperor!

Thus, her will is extraordinary, rivaled only by Su Lin within the entire Wolf Pack Civilization.

Because the path Su Lin walks is unique, a path that requires honing between life and death.

"Roach Emperor, all we have left are just over ten small military groups, totaling less than twenty trillion forces; as for the Heavenly Realm follower army, they..."

Millipede Cockroach King, in charge of the internal information of the Undying Cockroach Feudal Town and recently promoted, responded heavily.

Pausing mid-response, Millipede Cockroach King continued slowly: "Roach Emperor, your Heavenly Realm follower army...has been completely annihilated during the rearguard defense!"

Complete annihilation!

This term is unfamiliar to the Undying Cockroach Army Group.

Because the trait of Undying Cockroaches is their extremely formidable vitality, formidable to the point of fear!

Heavenly Realm-level Undying Cockroaches can revive from even a single trace, reborn into countless small cockroaches!

Yet almost a hundred billion Heavenly Realm followers now face complete annihilation, none surviving.

This is evidence of the methods the Black Sun Star Army employs.

Fiercely decisive and terrifying, erasing all traces in this starry sky.

"Hahaha!"

Upon hearing Millipede Cockroach King’s report, the Roach Emperor remained silent for a long time, then laughed somewhat like a somber release.

In this spirited laughter, the Roach Emperor’s originally dispirited aura steadily transforms, growing determined and frenzied, her arrogance blazing even fiercer.

"Did you hear? My followers have fought and died, and there’s no direct force left to threaten you. If any of you wish to escape, do so now. I cannot slaughter you like livestock, so leave! I won’t stop you!"

The Roach Emperor looked at the gathered kings and generals, transmitting this spiritual will.

Yet all War Kings and War Generals remained silent; none spoke, and none turned to leave.

All understand that the Roach Emperor wishes to leave a spark and retreat path for the Undying Cockroach Army Group, while she herself leads the remnant forces to their death!

Thus, none depart, only silently lowering their heads here.

From its rise to prominence, the Roach Emperor has embedded deeply in their hearts and souls, unshakeable.

They cannot fathom a future without the Roach Emperor.

Even though the Roach Emperor is cold and ruthless, slaughtering some weaker ones as though they were livestock, none resent her.

After all, the lives of Star Sky Insect Clan are inherently cheap!

Without brutally cold methods, their number, morale, spirit, discipline, and more would have long spiraled out of control.

And in the iron-blooded Wolf Pack Civilization, losing control means death!

Their fate may well implicate all members of the Undying Cockroach!

They know that even the cold, ruthless Roach Emperor does it to save them.

"Roach Emperor! I’m not leaving! And who said we will surely lose? Isn’t there still twenty trillion? We can fight for decades more, besides, the Hundred Races Army Group is en route to aid us. The Wolf Lord likely also received the battle report here; even if he wishes to weaken us, he won’t let us die entirely, right? So Roach Emperor, there’s still hope, you cannot give up! Once the Wolf Lord arrives, all the sins on you will be thoroughly cleansed!"

Purple Blood Cockroach King transmitted a spiritual will.

His heart also heavy, yet he refuses to see the Roach Emperor he’s admired for so many years truly fall!

Chapter 1952: Chapter 1952 - 1086: The Roach Emperor in Dire Straits, Reinforcements from the Four Great Military Groups!
============================================================

And after the Purple Blood Cockroach King issued this spiritual will, all the War Kings and War Generals followed suit.

Because in their eyes, they can die, but the Empress must not!

Once the Empress is dead, the Undying Cockroaches truly have no future!

In every Insect Clan, the most important entity is the Empress, while all other members serve as fuel.

This might seem cruel, but it’s something deeply ingrained in the bones and genes of the Star Sky Insect Clan through countless eras.

As the Roach Emperor gazed at this group of War Kings and War Generals who would follow her even unto death, though there was a touch of heartache in her eyes, what surged more was heroism.

Her arrogant aura became increasingly assertive!

Moments later, the Roach Emperor let out a long, screeching cry,

Her screech, as always, was sharp, piercing, and unpleasant, but it caused the remaining Undying Cockroach Army Group to join in with an exasperated howl.

And thousands of billions of miles away from them, lay the overwhelming, nearly a quadrillion-strong Black Sun Star Army.

Especially the Sin Army, having endured such millennia of blood battles, still maintained an impeccably organized military formation, with their morale sky-high.

This signified that they were an iron army, and apart from crushing them with greater force, no other tactic had any effect.

However, whether it was the Black Sun Star Army, or the Black Sun Star Lord sitting among the great army, even though they sensed the Undying Cockroach Army Group’s provocation and challenge through their cries, they made no movements.

Indifferently, they continued pushing through the starry sky inch by inch.

Because they had fallen for the Undying Cockroach Army Group’s tricks many times, being lured in only to have ambushing strong forces suddenly strike from behind.

Even the last assault on the Black Sun Star Lord used this method.

Therefore, this iron army would no longer be disturbed, just sweeping through step by step.

Set up strongholds, fight hopeless battles!

And such a method is the best way to deal with armies of extreme highway robbers and demons that use every trick in the book!

Under such all-encompassing iron-blooded slaughter, some of the Roach Emperor’s hidden measures were indeed cleared out.

"For the Roach Emperor! For the honor of our Undying Cockroaches!"

Some who disguised themselves as various cosmic substances, using their Stealth Talent to hide, were flushed out!

Without the slightest hesitation and not giving the Black Sun Star Army a chance to disgrace them, they self-destructed on the spot!

"Can’t hide anymore! Kill!"

There were also some adept at beguiling minds with Spiritual Soul Force; during a long howl, they activated hidden maze and illusion arrays, attempting to take some Black Sun Star Army members with them to death!

But just as they revealed themselves, they were met with fierce strikes from the Sin Army, resulting in their immediate decapitation.

Even these maze and illusion arrays, once anticipated, were easily broken.

Several subsequent Killing Arrays faced the same fate!

Under such meticulous advancement, no matter how many insidious tactics the Undying Cockroach Army Group had, they couldn’t hurt them in the least.

And the Roach Emperor’s incredibly powerful senses felt the slow advance of the Black Sun Stellar System’s army and her own rear measures being uprooted one by one, she realized she was destined to lose!

This great army before her was truly capable of conquering the starry sky and participating in star core battles, an iron army!

Such military power cannot be offset by some minor tactics.

However, neither the Roach Emperor nor her Undying Cockroach Army Group showed any sign of retreat!

Because the Roach Emperor knew that if the Wolf Lord wanted them dead, even if she retreated or fled to other vassal towns, it would still be death!

But if the Wolf Lord didn’t want them dead, then with the Wolf Lord’s unparalleled speed, he could appear before her in an instant.

So what of it?

Fight!

Fight!

If death comes, it can only be considered her misjudging the Wolf Lord!

Furthermore, isn’t a tragic end the ultimate destiny of all Star Sky Insect Clans?

If they survive, then by virtue of this battle, should the Roach Emperor not have a place for the Undying Cockroach Army Group in the extreme south in the future?

"Hahaha, we’ll wait for them to come! Rest and prepare, the advantage is ours!"

Finally, the Roach Emperor stood on a small constant star, sending out such a spiritual will.

Even though this spiritual will couldn’t withstand any introspection and could easily be exposed, not a single Undying Cockroach refuted it,

and they all howled in unison again.

Because the Undying Cockroach Army Group had long gotten used to the Roach Emperor’s words being absolute!

If the Roach Emperor said the advantage was theirs, then it was theirs!

When the Black Sun Star Army approached, they would immediately shred this invading enemy into pieces and devour them.

However, just as all the remaining Undying Cockroach Army Group gathered together, united for one last grand confrontation,

four vast and immense military groups had already silently rushed to the southern starry sky of the Wolf Pack Civilization!

Two of them even encircled the rear of the Black Sun Star Army!

They swept in from four directions, forming a super encirclement meant to consume the entire Black Sun Star Army.

The Golden Jade Demon Deer, Silence, Bloodthirsty Maniac Bee, Eating Spirit Crow King, Bloodthirsty Grass, and other commanders abandoned their vassal towns and nearly emptied their forces to arrive here!

Because the moment the Black Sun Star Army clashed with the Undying Cockroach Army Group, the Wolf Lord had given them an absolute order.

Otherwise, such large-scale military movement could not have arrived here in such a short time.

Even on all these military group exotic beasts, besides having grand Concealment Arrays, there was the Star Fog from the Sea of Star Sand to obscure heavenly mechanisms, block all divination, and even weaken the strongest and invincible senses by several layers,

because what the Wolf Lord desired was never a mere clash with the Black Sun Star Army, but to annihilate the main force of yet another Star Nebula Great Clan after the Hundred Stars Alliance!

The Wangshu Zone has been dormant for too long, now that it’s stirred, might as well shake thoroughly!

....

Faced with the two white wolves who had continued to follow him and rendered great merits in this battle, Su Lin didn’t hesitate to give them a reward of three hundred pounds of flesh. The sudden huge reward excited Xiao Hui to howl happily on the spot, and even though Little Lone Wolf didn’t show much on the surface, its joyful howl told Su Lin how exceptionally delighted the two wolves were.

Other members of the Wolf Clan, as long as they participated in the battle and had excellent achievements, whether Beta Wolf or Hai Wolf, all received their deserved rewards. In an instant, the entire cave echoed with vibrant energy akin to humans celebrating the New Year, every rewarded white wolf, especially the lively ones, couldn’t help but jump around.

After rewarding the Wolf Clan, Su Lin turned his gaze once more to the Bear Clan, who had followed him into battle. The white bears leading the Bear Clan were eager after seeing the hundred pounds of flesh rewarded to the Wolf Clan, they were even more expectant of their own rewards.

The Land of Adventure during the days of the polar sun is not easy to hunt in. Since the Ice Age began, many Variant Species appeared among the fauna, rendering hunting in the already harsh Arctic environment even more challenging. A moment of carelessness could lead to death under a predator’s fanged tooth for merely a dozen pounds of flesh.

A large part of why many Bear Clans chose to follow the White Wolf was for ample flesh and better quality Variant Species Flesh.

Su Lin, naturally not forgetting the Bear Clan who had always followed him in battle, gave a loud howl and distributed plenty of flesh to the Bear Clan as well.

The Bear Clan gathered in one place, having cohabited with the White Wolf Pack long enough to roughly understand the meaning in the white wolves’ howls, they were all very happy, issuing "hohoho" roars in the cave. This bountiful harvest strengthened their allegiance to the White Wolf even further.

Su Lin also understood that this battle had made his tribemates more loyal, so he spared no effort in rewarding those who fought alongside him, to cultivate a greater sense of belonging among more animals. Su Lin’s tribe would only grow stronger and more formidable over time until it became the unassailable Arctic Overlord of the entire icefield!

Chapter 1953: Chapter 1953 - 1087: Wolf Lord Ambushed, a Desperate Battle!
============================================================

Apart from the four great military groups coming to the rescue,

A wolf shadow carrying infinite star energy, the power of all living beings, and vitality force, is charging to this battlefield like a Supreme Sovereign Demon God, stepping on the river of space-time!

Su Lin’s current strength has reached an unparalleled level.

Having refined the Celestial Wolf Wings with over seventy stars and hundreds of small constant stars, it now possesses the power to shatter Extreme Heaven Realm Heavy Artifacts!

It must be noted that all of Su Lin’s heavy weapons are merely Extreme Heaven Realm Heavy Artifacts, and even some taboo existences only use quasi-taboo heavy artifacts.

In strict terms, they are still Extreme Heaven Realm Heavy Artifacts.

Thus, Su Lin’s Celestial Wolf Wings have already reached the standard of true taboo heavy artifacts.

This seems like a mythological legend.

Because creating a taboo heavy artifact is extremely difficult, not only needing a powerful artifact spirit but also immense resources!

It requires at least dozens of types of divine gold for refinement, vast dimension true meaning for nurturing, and massive infusions of fate and fortune.

Often, the fate and fortune needed to create a taboo heavy artifact are enough to shape the prototype of a Fate Altar.

Therefore, most forces would first exhaust everything to shape the Fate Altar, never wasting fate and fortune on a taboo heavy artifact.

After all, a taboo heavy artifact depends on the user’s strength, but once you step onto the forbidden altar, you can suppress countless Star Sky Geniuses!

However, this doesn’t mean that taboo heavy artifacts are not powerful!

Taboo existence wielding a taboo heavy artifact can crush a Level 5 Star System and tear a Level 6 Small Star Core, with overwhelming might.

No faction can imagine that the Wolf Lord has achieved the taboo heavy artifact level with a part of himself.

Besides the Celestial Wolf Wings, Su Lin’s wolf body has also improved in feedback from the massive star energy and the power of all living beings, even the numerical attributes have soared by over ten percent.

This means that although Su Lin’s wolf body can’t compare with a taboo heavy artifact, it has attained the intensity of a quasi-taboo heavy artifact.

Currently, even without using anything, just standing, only quasi-taboo existences or taboo existences can shatter his body.

If he relies on his ability to step on the river of space-time with speed that even Dimensional Truth can’t catch up with, Su Lin is innately invincible!

Unless a taboo existence appears, no one can touch him!

"Enough for Level Three upgrade! The Fifth Gene Barrier within is becoming clearer."

At this moment, as Su Lin traversed through space-time, he sensed the accumulation of Evolution Essence and the Genetic Metamorphosis barrier.

With more than seventy stars and hundreds of small constant stars refined into his body, even without direct devouring, Su Lin has gained massive Evolution Essence, sufficient for three upgrades.

This would at least elevate him to the pinnacle of the Ten Layers of Heaven!

As for whether he could transform the eleventh layer mark from virtual to reality, Su Lin felt it unlikely.

After all, that ancient road had been broken!

Therefore, he cares most about the Fifth Genetic Metamorphosis, as this is his unique path.

Looking out, some have walked the old Heavenly Boundary path like the Peng Emperor!

Some have proven atomic-level taboo like Blazing Flame Ink!

Many have walked the conventional taboo path, stepping on the Fate Altar, and they still stand at the summit of Blazing Nebula’s power!

But only the path of Genetic Metamorphosis has not been traveled by any species.

Across an expanse of star nebulas, except for himself, Su Lin hasn’t heard a hint of information or clues about this path.

This makes him increasingly eager to see what level he’d reach after the Fifth Genetic Metamorphosis?

Will his genes undergo a qualitative change, or will he truly become immortal?

Or like the atomic level proof or renewing the Heavenly Boundary path, evolve into a small cosmos?

Thus, Su Lin has a great desire for the Fifth Genetic Metamorphosis!

Currently, he’s only touched upon the Fifth Genetic Metamorphosis, but not at that level, he’s ultimately seeing it as vague as viewing a flower through mist, unable to discern what realm it truly is.

Let alone the Fifth Genetic Metamorphosis, even for the taboo realms of the other three paths, Su Lin doesn’t consider himself thoroughly understanding, nor able to comprehend their Divine Might?

And in these reflections, Su Lin quickly approaches the southern Starry Sky Battlefield of the Wolf Pack.

Just as he’s about to reach the southern Starry Sky Battlefield of the Wolf Pack, a powerful aura that shakes the entire starry sky and also makes the river of space-time bow down appears suddenly before him.

Even upon appearing, relying merely on the force of the body, it collided fiercely with Su Lin!

Boom!

Instantly, vitality force pierces through this starry sky like a dragon, and the sheer destructive power caused this starry sky to shatter vibrantly.

Large patches of black holes, and even starry sky barriers appear!

"Who is it?"

This causes the divine light in Su Lin’s eyes to become as dazzling as the sun, and reflects the starry sky, through this terrifying destruction, intending to see the true body ahead.

Because even he didn’t expect, after blood refining over seventy stars and hundreds of small constant stars, feeling shocked at his body’s strength, there would be an existence giving him such a head-on blow!

Even with his all-embracing senses, he could only feel its existence when that silhouette came to strike!

This is an ultimate being who, following Illusion God, makes Su Lin once again feel threatened,

This causes him to roar, and his full momentum enters the pinnacle, confronting the presence shrouded in black robes.

Chapter 1954: Chapter 1954 - 1087: Wolf Lord Ambushed, a Desperate Battle! (Part 2)
============================================================

But during the standoff, a grand and intricate Concealment Array behind this black robe figure slowly dissipated, revealing a densely packed and formidable army of thirty billion troops at the Heavenly Boundary!

And they were all troops at the Heavenly Boundary bearing the Mark of Sin!

......

At this moment, the Black Sun Star Army had finally advanced to the small constant star defended by the Undying Cockroach Army Group,

The Black Sun Star Army stood in formation, not a sound was uttered, only the soaring killing intent and morale could be felt.

Such discipline and spirit, across the Wangshu Zone, likely only the elite forces of the Red Sun Empire, Wolf Pack Civilization, and parts of the Bright Day System could achieve.

Within the Wolf Pack Civilization, perhaps the Star War Army Group, Guardian Divine Army, Nightmare Army could manage it.

None of the other military groups could achieve this.

But now, all the Sin Armies of the Black Sun Star have done it, only those from the vassal forces occasionally emanate some complex spiritual will.

This filled the Roach Emperor’s heart with another wave of awe toward the elite of the Black Sun Star Army.

And just as he was in shock, the Black Sun Star Lord appeared atop his battle formation as if emerging from an illusion.

Looking down at the Roach Emperor on the small constant star, he said: "Roach Emperor, that is your title, isn’t it? We’ve faced each other for over a thousand years; you’ve held me off with a fledgling Star Sky Insect Clan for more than a millennium, quite impressive. If you submit to me, I can offer you the position of Vice Star Lord!"

The Black Sun Star Lord stood in the sky, his injuries healed over such a long time, fully recovered, emanating a fearsome aura of Late Stage of Half-step Forbidden.

He too bore the Mark of Sin, whether in physique, Origin Power, Heavenly Boundary True Intent, or Dimensional True Intent, all were unparalleled and matched top-tier Star Sky Physiques.

He is an example of a Mortal Body transforming into the strongest Sin Body, so he genuinely appreciates the Roach Emperor who also rose from humble beginnings.

Since he knows that a strongest who rises from the bottom possesses far more potential than one born at the peak of a great clan!

But for a long time after the Black Sun Star Lord’s spiritual will landed, the Roach Emperor remained calm without making any sound.

This let the Black Sun Star Lord know the answer!

He looked at the Undying Cockroach Army Group, which fought through bloodshed to this day with an over eighty percent casualty rate, maintaining such military morale and spirit, daring to fight to the death, and felt genuine reluctance and admiration in his eyes.

Bringing a young Star Sky Insect Clan to this state is no easy feat; the Insect Queen would understand this best.

After all, few can remain cold-blooded and ruthless, endlessly screening and slaughtering their subordinate clans, nor can anyone maintain such morale and spirit after the slaughter!

After a brief pause, the Black Sun Star Lord sent a deeply confidential spiritual will: "Roach Emperor, if my guess is correct, are you waiting for the Wolf Lord? Or other reinforcements? Actually, I can clearly tell you, the reinforcements from the four Vassal Town Army Groups of the Wolf Pack Civilization, totaling just over forty trillion, are just peripheral forces, so their arrival will merely add more corpses to this Starry Sky Battlefield without changing the outcome,

Besides, my inch-by-inch advance is also a wait for them, since slaughtering them here means my Black Sun Star Army can directly reach the Sky Wolf System with no more obstructions! As for the Wolf Lord...."

Here, the Black Sun Star Lord paused briefly before saying: "He won’t come, maybe his corpse will, and as long you kneel, I will offer you a vast stellar space!"

With that, the starry sky shook!

Even if the entire Undying Cockroach Army Group worshipped the Roach Emperor, after this spiritual will, all enlightened members of the Undying Cockroach changed color!

Because once enlightened, they understood what the Wolf Lord means within the Wolf Pack Civilization?

If the Wolf Lord fell,

Then, as the Black Sun Star Lord said, the four rapidly approaching Vassal Town Army Groups would merely add more bloodshed and corpses to this great war.

This caused the Roach Emperor’s eyes to blaze blood-black, as he screeched sharply, and the entire Undying Cockroach Army Group became agitated.

Soaring killing intent churned like ocean waves.

Its prototype soul bone, initially containing determined and relentless essence, rapidly took shape as the Roach Emperor decided to fight the last battle with his life.

Every Extreme Heaven Realm Secret Technique is earth-shattering, created under immense pressure and opportunities.

And as the soul bone rapidly formed, the aura on the Roach Emperor accumulated a trace of mysterious Dimensional True Intent.

Yet at this moment, aside from the Black Sun Star Lord noticing changes on the Roach Emperor, none did.

Because as the Roach Emperor nearly descended into possession by demons, embodying sin,

The entire Undying Cockroach Army Group went mad, using the very few Star Stone intelligent Exotic Beasts to launch the first wave of attacks against the Black Sun Star Army.

Following this, apart from some defending the small constant star, the rest of the Undying Cockroach Army Group poured out, unexpectedly launching an attack on the Black Sun Star Army!

At the same time, the Roach Emperor with a last bit of clarity, tore through time and space into the Black Sun Star Army,

Then forcibly exploded more than twenty foil-level killing devices gifted by the Wolf Lord and accumulated by himself.

"Madness! Madness! You, a dignified Star Sky Insect Queen, is your life so cheap to use it for this suicidal tactic to hurt the enemy?"

The Black Sun Star Lord roared in fury, the admiration in his eyes entirely vanished, as he didn’t expect the Roach Emperor would launch a suicide charge!

In his roar, the Black Sun Star Lord also executed a supreme great technique, attempting to push out the vast foil-level power.

But ultimately too late, in just an instant, countless Sin Army who couldn’t react and hadn’t formed a battle formation were vaporized, even their bones couldn’t be found, only some spirituality essence floated upwards!

Boom!

Boom!

Boom!

In the midst of a series of violent explosions, at the center of the foil-level killing devices, despite stepping into half-step taboo, the Roach Emperor was grievously injured beyond recognition, leaving only a skeleton!

Yet even that eerie green skeleton bore an imposing and arrogant manner, its vast sin True Intent burning like fire,

This made the Roach Emperor appear as a sinful war deity walking from destruction, his remaining battle instincts pushing his skeletal form headlong into the Sin Star Army, beginning a bloody slaughter.

At this moment, the Roach Emperor’s incisive actions responded to the Black Sun Star Lord’s recent overture!

With a backbone of pride, how could she kneel?

And seeing their queen in such a scene, all the Undying Cockroaches went utterly mad, burning their Essence of Life, forming a massive battle formation charged fearlessly at the Black Sun Star Army!

This earth-shaking turmoil alerted the four nearby military groups, whose commanders in their howling cries led part of the elite forces rushing to this battlefield.

Because they all knew, the Undying Cockroach Army Group had fought for over a thousand years, continuing such an immense war without cease, it may be exhausted soon!

....

Chapter 1955: Chapter 1955 - 1088: Quasi-Taboo Battle
============================================================

"Kill!"

The commanders and elite aces of the four major military groups quickly reached this battlefield, and as soon as they entered, they felt a bloodthirsty aura that was intense to the point of brutality.

All they could see were corpses and blood.

From such a scene, they knew to what extent this battle had reached?

Yet even in this state, the Undying Cockroach Army Group still had a combat spirit that spread like wildfire, and even the remaining two hundred thousand ancestor-level military power showed a strength far beyond all the other major military groups.

This made these commanders have an indelible respect for the Roach Emperor and the Undying Cockroach Army Group.

No wonder it was appointed by the Wolf Lord as the strongest vassal town!

No wonder the Roach Emperor could add Six Honors, reigning above the other Three Emperors.

After all, such a brutal battle, unbearable to witness, already represented everything.

"Kill!"

The elite aces of the four rushing military groups hesitated not at all, directly waving the Star Sky Battle Flag, bringing the vast destiny into the battle group.

However, the Black Sun Constant Star Lord clearly anticipated reinforcements, and instantly the surrounding forty trillion Sin Army turned their direction to begin their crusade against the four major military groups.

Even though those who came were elite aces, upon first contact with the Sin Army, they all felt the unparalleled power of this army.

Boom!

Boom!

With each thundering clash of the battle, all four elite aces couldn’t break through the war formations of these Sin Army, and instead, they were forced to retreat bit by bit.

"What’s happening? Are all the opponents the Roach Emperor has faced over these thousand years this abnormal? The battle formation is too tight, and the military power too strong! We can’t break through with just our elite!"

The Corpse Worm King, who previously had interactions and disputes with the Roach Emperor, felt the powerful iron-blooded Sin Army before him and also released such a surprised spiritual will.

It further recognized the gap between its own commanded Corpse Insect Clan and the Undying Cockroach Clan.

Perhaps they were once a dominant force in the entire Blazing Nebula, but now they’re merely a surviving bloodline, not even a tenth of the Undying Cockroach Army Group!

"If you can’t hold on, just maneuver and harass, don’t meet them head-on, this military force is indeed too strong!"

The commanders and war generals of the other major military groups also shouted out loud,

The Wolf Pack Civilization never cared about so-called face, if they couldn’t fight head-on, they would maneuver and harass—preserving strength was the true path.

"Humph! So aside from the Undying Cockroach, the Wolf Pack Civilization is just a bunch of scoundrels who can’t withstand a single blow!"

At this time, the Black Sun Constant Star Lord, having expended great energy to block the foil-level killing device, sensed the surrounding elite aces from the four military groups and sneered disdainfully.

After sneering, his mind moved, and out appeared his Extreme Heaven Realm Heavy Artifact—Sin Blade!

This is a long weapon with the true intent of endless Sin Star, capable of defying the heavens, altering the sky’s air flames.

The Black Sun Constant Star Lord directly threw it towards the Roach Emperor!

Splatter!

In an instant, it tore through space and shattered the Roach Emperor’s bones!

Despite that, the Roach Emperor’s skeleton still tried to break free, but was directly pinned to the spot by the vast might of this Sin Blade!

The Black Sun Constant Star Lord roared, leading his followers straight towards the battlefield of the remaining forces.

After all, having subdued the Roach Emperor, leaving twenty trillion Sin Army and thirty trillion vassal forces was more than enough to clear the Undying Cockroach Army Group,

He aimed to defeat the incoming military groups as quickly as possible.

Because the Black Sun Constant Star Lord knew that the Wolf Lord, who could make the Roach Emperor and the Undying Cockroach Army Group willingly submit, might possess even more remarkable means and prestige.

Even though he was extremely confident in the High Priest and Hidden Guard, the Black Sun Constant Star Lord was used to fighting with full force!

He wasted no more time and only wanted to quickly sweep away all enemies in this battle and then assist the High Priest!

Because their decisive battle with the Wolf Pack Civilization was never here, but rather over there with the High Priest and Wolf Lord!

If the High Priest were defeated, even if the Black Sun Constant Star Lord swept the Wolf Pack Civilization’s five major military groups, he would still have to retreat.

On one hand, these five major military groups are merely the vassal towns of the Wolf Pack Civilization and have not reached the point of completely breaking the Wolf Pack Civilization’s backbone.

On the other hand, an existence that can defeat the High Priest and thirty billion Heavenly Boundary Hidden Guards, the Black Sun Constant Star Lord cannot imagine how terrifying the Wolf Lord might be?

Even if unable to ascend to taboo power, it is likely not far off.

......

And as the bloody battle in the Southern starry sky of the Wolf Pack Civilization was reignited,

The Wolf Lord and that figure shrouded in a black robe had already pierced through space-time, reaching the Star Sky Barrier.

Su Lin never expected that traversing the starry sky alone would lead to such accurate ambush.

Because with his Divine Speed, it had reached a level where even taboo existences could not randomly deduce it,

At one moment he was in the Hundred Stars Alliance, and the next he might be hundreds of light-years away.

Ripping space-time, for a half-step taboo, was a norm.

For Su Lin, his speed already surpassed the Space-Time River, and he could even attempt to explore the future and past like a taboo existence along the Space-Time River.

Only within it contained the cause and effect that could destroy all living things, making Su Lin’s intuition shudder in fear, so he never touched this cause and effect.

Yet he never imagined that despite his unprecedented speed, he still fell into the encirclement’s trap.

Chapter 1943: Chapter 1943 - 1082: Blood Battle Under the Crimson Sun, Hundred Stars Ensnare the Wolf Lord!
============================================================

Red Sun Empire, a powerful Star Nebula Great Clan of the new star, was once a legendary myth in the Wangshu Zone.

Now, this legendary myth has once again shocked the Bright Day System, or the entire Wangshu Zone.

The batch of Hundred Battles Immortality veterans from the founding war has reappeared, more formidable than before.

This means these founders and veterans, after establishing the Red Sun Empire, truly abandoned all fame and fortune, concealing their strength in secret cultivation.

What kind of mindset is this?

Even more incredible than the rumored release of military power with a cup of wine!

And what kind of charisma does the Red Sun Emperor possess to make these Hundred Battles Immortality founders and veterans achieve this?

No one knows!

But it is clear that with this batch of veterans appearing, the confrontation between the Red Sun Empire and the Bright Day System will continue.

Even if the Red Sun Empire remains at a disadvantage, it still has the ability to drag the colossal entity of the Bright Day System to death together!

And these veterans, who have hibernated for two full eras, have also revealed the edge they’ve sharpened over those eras.

In the initial clash, they revealed that there are as many as three hundred billion Heavenly Boundary soldiers among them, already accounting for sixty percent of the Sun Emperor’s forces!

Silent until now, they astonish everyone!

This batch of soldiers from the Red Sun Empire has truly shocked the entire Wangshu Zone; just two eras of foundation have nearly rivaled half of the Bright Day System!

This is too fantastical and unbelievable!

The remaining ones are all at the Peak of Quasi-Heaven Realm, honed over two eras, with physique and Heavenly Boundary True Intent solid and firm!

Therefore, the strength of this military force is rare in the Wangshu Zone!

Even with twenty trillion against three hundred mega trillion, both sides are still involved in extremely fierce combat.

"Empress! This batch of people all practiced the Blazing Flame Body using True Blood from Blazing Flame Royal Family, and also have the bloodline enhancement method from the Blazing Flame Royal Family. How is this possible?"

A Sunshine Marquis commanding the Great Army surrounding these veterans also cried out in terror.

The Blazing Flame Body is a physique owned by the Blazing Flame Royal Family; even if it’s not a top-tier celestial physique, it’s still a First-Class physique.

Considering the bloodline enhancement method, combat power can soar to a level despairing to peers.

But they never imagined that these veterans also possess the Blazing Flame Body!

"Red Sun Emperor, are you seeking death? From where did you acquire so much True Blood from the Blazing Flame Royal Family, are you not afraid the day they resurrected they would flay and bone you?"

The Sun Empress, upon witnessing this, was also outraged.

Because she never expected the Red Sun Empire’s reserved veterans all practiced the Blazing Flame Body.

This is too rebellious!

This also tramples the face and dignity of the Blazing Flame Royal Family underfoot, driving these rulers mad with fury!

"Hahaha! This all came from the Black Sun Clan’s collection when I besieged Blazing Flame Ink, and the clan had far more Essence Blood than this. You used to boast and bow to the Blazing Flame Royal Family without knowing how many became prisoners of the Black Sun Clan, so even if they are to die, the Black Sun Clan should die first. But would the so-called Blazing Flame Royal Family dare seek revenge against the Black Sun Clan?

If not, then don’t act so high and speak so loudly! To you, it’s rebellious, but to me, it’s just a resource!"

The Red Sun Emperor’s extreme boasting laughter also spread across this battlefield.

He showed no respect due to the Blazing Flame Royal Family!

In his eyes, the Blazing Flame Royal Family is just a colossal resource.

If destroying the Blazing Flame Clan remnants could yield enormous resources, he would be the first to act.

The Red Sun Emperor is a hero; he cares not for false reputations, only practical substance!

Moreover, upon rising, he killed the Blazing Flame Royal Family’s Direct Lineage, so what is left to fear?

"Seeking death!"

"Seeking death!"

"Seeking death!"

......

Upon hearing the Red Sun Emperor’s rebellious spirit laugh, the surrounding Sunshine Marquises also shouted angrily.

But even in their utmost rage, the Red Sun Emperor is still too powerful!

His Invincible Blazing Flame Nine Suns Body, even with an arm severed, remains peerlessly dominant in the starry sky, and these marquises cannot break through the Red Sun Emperor’s Defense.

Only relying on the battle formation of billions of Heavenly Boundary Death Warriors, clashing and suppressing the Red Sun Emperor repeatedly.

Even though the Red Sun Emperor’s body receives numerous injuries, his momentum grows crazier and stronger.

Because he rose from a small figure, sustaining injuries drives his unwillingness and pushes him to drag all opponents with him to death!

But in this frantic bloodbath, the Red Sun Empire’s military force and the Sunshine System Military Force still have a large gap, being pushed little by little towards the Red Sun Star direction.

The Red Sun Empire’s Great Army ultimately cannot withstand the Sunshine System, retreating step by step.

But the closer they get to the Red Sun Star, the stronger the enhancement they receive, and this retreat is turning into a stalemate!

The cold glint in the Red Sun Emperor’s eyes grows even colder, staring at the surrounding marquises and the martial prowess stunning Wangshu Zone’s Sun Empress, like a vicious beast eyeing prey!

Red Sun Emperor, are you seeking death? From where did you acquire so much True Blood from the Blazing Flame Royal Family, are you not afraid the day they resurrected they would flay and bone you?"

He is just waiting, waiting to see if the Sunshine System has any hidden Fatal Strike, or if the true Sun Emperor will emerge from the Star Core?

Chapter 1944: Chapter 1944 - 1082: Crimson Sun Bloodbath, Hundred Stars Encircle the Wolf Lord! (Part 2)
============================================================

....

At this moment,

Apart from the Red Sun Empire and the Bright Day System being engaged in the most intense and heated battle,

Su Lin and the Hundred Stars Alliance’s battle has also, over these hundreds of years, escalated to a level that shakes the starry sky, with a bloody aura filling the space!

The Great Army of Yangyang Star along with the elite forces of various Stellar Systems at both Quasi-Sky and Sky Realms are indeed formidable!

Over these centuries, they clashed multiple times head-on with the three main military groups of the Wolf Pack Civilization, and although they retreated each time, their formation remained intact, and their foundation was still solid!

Yet, in these hundreds of years, the Wolf Pack Civilization only managed to sweep five Stellar Systems and more than ten Small Constant Stars, but they lost the six Stellar Systems and more than twenty Small Constant Stars that they had originally subjugated.

In this light, the tables have turned!

In these hundreds of years, the Wolf Pack Civilization seems to have gained nothing significant; instead, they have exhausted the resources they had previously plundered.

But it was at this moment,

when everyone assumed the Wolf Pack Civilization’s defeat was inevitable and they were about to reap the bitter fruit,

even the Lord of Yangyang, filled with endless ambition, finally released the Hundred Stars Godslaying Army, which had been kept in hiding as the final lifeline of the Hundred Stars Alliance.

Because he wanted to orchestrate a super event big enough to shock the entire Wangshu Zone!

A trap to eliminate the Master of Heavenly Wolf!

Once the Wolf Lord was dead, all the crises would be resolved,

and the inherently chaotic Wolf Pack Civilization, with its military factions at odds, would inevitably fall apart without their strong Emperor.

By then, he would rally millions of billion troops from the Hundred Stars Alliance to conquer the Sky Wolf System.

To the south lies the Black Sun Stellar System, to the west the Void Abyss Mayfly Clan, and to the east himself; the Wolf Pack Civilization was destined to become history.

And he would achieve unparalleled merit, rising to become a significant figure in the Wangshu Zone.

At this time,

The Hundred Stars Godslaying Army was fully assembled.

A formidable force of 80 billion battle-hardened soldiers, secretly trained for an unknown duration, exhausting untold resources of the Hundred Stars Alliance.

They had even, at the invitation of the Sun Emperor, engaged in several deadly battles at the Star Core.

Now, this army quietly stood before the Lord of Yangyang.

This army was not entirely comprised of rumored elite Sky Realm forces; only over 20 billion were at the Sky Realm, while the rest were all at the Peak of the Quasi-Sky Realm!

Yet, even so, this was astonishingly impressive.

Because gathering over 20 billion Sky Realm forces requires an immense amount of resources.

For an alliance such as the Hundred Stars Alliance, with over a hundred factions cooperating, to contribute resources for such a great army was truly remarkable.

Only those who have managed a large force, especially an alliance, know how difficult this is.

Since they aren’t truly united, the fact that no single faction is solely pursuing their own interests is already a blessing!

Thus, the Hundred Stars Godslaying Army is like a legendary creation.

Equipped with full sets of Sky Realm armor, star energy weapons, and even a fleet of over twenty Star Sky Mother Ship Groups!

This is a truly invincible and heavily armed army!

Gazing upon such a powerful army, even the Lord of Yangyang could not suppress his pride, and after scrutinizing them, he roared: "Long time no see, you are all the elite heroes summoned from various Stellar Systems, since your formation, it’s been more than half an Era, originally established to fend off the Red Sun Empire, but now it seems we won’t need to use them against the Red Sun Empire,

as they have the Bright Day System to handle, but we’ve found ourselves a new opponent!

That opponent has slaughtered one-third of the Hundred Stars Alliance’s territories, refining many stellar systems into mere decorations on their wings, this enmity is irreconcilable!"

After the Lord of Yangyang’s spiritual will, the Hundred Stars Godslaying Army remained still, making no movement, only the heavy and murderous intent surging forward.

"So this hatred must be avenged, and in this battle, we may die! We may become another nameless heap of corpses in the starry sky, but the Hundred Stars Alliance has supported you for over an Era, now is the time for you to repay that time,

just thousands of billion miles away on the battlefield, the three main military groups of the Wolf Pack Civilization are all being held up, and that Demon Wolf Lord is alone for the first time, so I’m willing to personally lead the Hundred Stars Godslaying Army, taking the lead, to surround and kill... the Wolf Pack Civilization’s Master! I wonder.... will you dare to join me to earn this unparalleled merit?"

The gaze of the Lord of Yangyang became determined to the extreme,

And upon his second spiritual will, the entire Hundred Stars Godslaying Army voiced no slogans, no oaths, only responded with their killing intent soaring and the clamor of weapons clashing, bodies vibrating in unison!

Even among the reverberating sounds, there were many members of the Godslaying Army whose Home Planets had long been destroyed, their eyes burning with flames of vengeance!

Then,

Pausing for a moment longer, the Lord of Yangyang hesitated no more, and led this army, considered the strongest of the entire Hundred Stars Alliance, directly towards the starry sky where the Wolf Lord resided.

This was a spectacular gamble by the Hundred Stars Alliance, staking all its elite forces and trump cards,

If they lost, the Hundred Stars Alliance might be reduced to only one Yangyang Star,

If they won, then the Hundred Stars Alliance could leap forward, possibly replacing the position of the Wolf Pack Civilization, becoming the new New Star Dominator in the entire Wangshu Zone!

But just as this super trump card of the Hundred Stars Alliance finally surfaced,

A force that had remained hidden in the dark all along began to move slowly, undisturbed even by the Hundred Stars Alliance’s recapture of six Stellar Systems and over twenty Small Constant Stars, it flanked directly towards the Hundred Stars Godslaying Army.

This force was not large, even less than a tenth of the Hundred Stars Godslaying Army, but its aura seemed to dominate all stars, its battle spirit and morale nearly tangible, as if invincible!

......

Su Lin had the intention of cultivating the two humans before him to become his spokespersons, so when faced with these two humans, he also gave many rewards, distributing to Sander and Tiffany a full 200 pounds of flesh, enough for them to survive for some time.

This took Sander and Tiffany by surprise, but filled their hearts with gratitude towards the White Wolf, not expecting that by participating in the battle, they could receive so much food.

Sander couldn’t help but recall his days in the Human Fortress, where he was at the lowest social rung, being mocked and even humiliated was common, especially when human society was experiencing a scarcity of resources, with precious Variant Species Flesh reserved for the high rank or powerful New Humans, leaving bottom dwellers like him unable to partake, making his life now seem like the right choice compared to the past.

And Tiffany, in the Human Fortress, was merely a tool with some utility for the high ranks, similar to many of her peers who were as expendable as cannon fodder, with no rescue action from the Human Fortress since she and Sander had been in the Arctic, her heart had long turned cold, and now seeing that in the Wolf Clan, just contributing could earn fresh Variant Species Flesh, Tiffany and Sander both made a certain decision almost simultaneously.

Su Lin noticed the expressions of the two, their sentiments seemed genuine and it was exactly Su Lin’s intention, he could almost guess the disintegrated state of human civilization during the Ice Age, and with just small favors, he could gain their unwavering loyalty, a deal too good to pass up. His eyes shone with astonishment.

How powerful must a species be to defeat the Mad Thunder Skyhawk with such overwhelming strength, and brazenly carry its corpse towards the Land of Adventure.
