Chapter 1954: Chapter 1954 - 1087: Wolf Lord Ambushed, a Desperate Battle! (Part 2)
============================================================

But during the standoff, a grand and intricate Concealment Array behind this black robe figure slowly dissipated, revealing a densely packed and formidable army of thirty billion troops at the Heavenly Boundary!

And they were all troops at the Heavenly Boundary bearing the Mark of Sin!

......

At this moment, the Black Sun Star Army had finally advanced to the small constant star defended by the Undying Cockroach Army Group,

The Black Sun Star Army stood in formation, not a sound was uttered, only the soaring killing intent and morale could be felt.

Such discipline and spirit, across the Wangshu Zone, likely only the elite forces of the Red Sun Empire, Wolf Pack Civilization, and parts of the Bright Day System could achieve.

Within the Wolf Pack Civilization, perhaps the Star War Army Group, Guardian Divine Army, Nightmare Army could manage it.

None of the other military groups could achieve this.

But now, all the Sin Armies of the Black Sun Star have done it, only those from the vassal forces occasionally emanate some complex spiritual will.

This filled the Roach Emperor’s heart with another wave of awe toward the elite of the Black Sun Star Army.

And just as he was in shock, the Black Sun Star Lord appeared atop his battle formation as if emerging from an illusion.

Looking down at the Roach Emperor on the small constant star, he said: "Roach Emperor, that is your title, isn’t it? We’ve faced each other for over a thousand years; you’ve held me off with a fledgling Star Sky Insect Clan for more than a millennium, quite impressive. If you submit to me, I can offer you the position of Vice Star Lord!"

The Black Sun Star Lord stood in the sky, his injuries healed over such a long time, fully recovered, emanating a fearsome aura of Late Stage of Half-step Forbidden.

He too bore the Mark of Sin, whether in physique, Origin Power, Heavenly Boundary True Intent, or Dimensional True Intent, all were unparalleled and matched top-tier Star Sky Physiques.

He is an example of a Mortal Body transforming into the strongest Sin Body, so he genuinely appreciates the Roach Emperor who also rose from humble beginnings.

Since he knows that a strongest who rises from the bottom possesses far more potential than one born at the peak of a great clan!

But for a long time after the Black Sun Star Lord’s spiritual will landed, the Roach Emperor remained calm without making any sound.

This let the Black Sun Star Lord know the answer!

He looked at the Undying Cockroach Army Group, which fought through bloodshed to this day with an over eighty percent casualty rate, maintaining such military morale and spirit, daring to fight to the death, and felt genuine reluctance and admiration in his eyes.

Bringing a young Star Sky Insect Clan to this state is no easy feat; the Insect Queen would understand this best.

After all, few can remain cold-blooded and ruthless, endlessly screening and slaughtering their subordinate clans, nor can anyone maintain such morale and spirit after the slaughter!

After a brief pause, the Black Sun Star Lord sent a deeply confidential spiritual will: "Roach Emperor, if my guess is correct, are you waiting for the Wolf Lord? Or other reinforcements? Actually, I can clearly tell you, the reinforcements from the four Vassal Town Army Groups of the Wolf Pack Civilization, totaling just over forty trillion, are just peripheral forces, so their arrival will merely add more corpses to this Starry Sky Battlefield without changing the outcome,

Besides, my inch-by-inch advance is also a wait for them, since slaughtering them here means my Black Sun Star Army can directly reach the Sky Wolf System with no more obstructions! As for the Wolf Lord...."

Here, the Black Sun Star Lord paused briefly before saying: "He won’t come, maybe his corpse will, and as long you kneel, I will offer you a vast stellar space!"

With that, the starry sky shook!

Even if the entire Undying Cockroach Army Group worshipped the Roach Emperor, after this spiritual will, all enlightened members of the Undying Cockroach changed color!

Because once enlightened, they understood what the Wolf Lord means within the Wolf Pack Civilization?

If the Wolf Lord fell,

Then, as the Black Sun Star Lord said, the four rapidly approaching Vassal Town Army Groups would merely add more bloodshed and corpses to this great war.

This caused the Roach Emperor’s eyes to blaze blood-black, as he screeched sharply, and the entire Undying Cockroach Army Group became agitated.

Soaring killing intent churned like ocean waves.

Its prototype soul bone, initially containing determined and relentless essence, rapidly took shape as the Roach Emperor decided to fight the last battle with his life.

Every Extreme Heaven Realm Secret Technique is earth-shattering, created under immense pressure and opportunities.

And as the soul bone rapidly formed, the aura on the Roach Emperor accumulated a trace of mysterious Dimensional True Intent.

Yet at this moment, aside from the Black Sun Star Lord noticing changes on the Roach Emperor, none did.

Because as the Roach Emperor nearly descended into possession by demons, embodying sin,

The entire Undying Cockroach Army Group went mad, using the very few Star Stone intelligent Exotic Beasts to launch the first wave of attacks against the Black Sun Star Army.

Following this, apart from some defending the small constant star, the rest of the Undying Cockroach Army Group poured out, unexpectedly launching an attack on the Black Sun Star Army!

At the same time, the Roach Emperor with a last bit of clarity, tore through time and space into the Black Sun Star Army,

Then forcibly exploded more than twenty foil-level killing devices gifted by the Wolf Lord and accumulated by himself.

"Madness! Madness! You, a dignified Star Sky Insect Queen, is your life so cheap to use it for this suicidal tactic to hurt the enemy?"

The Black Sun Star Lord roared in fury, the admiration in his eyes entirely vanished, as he didn’t expect the Roach Emperor would launch a suicide charge!

In his roar, the Black Sun Star Lord also executed a supreme great technique, attempting to push out the vast foil-level power.

But ultimately too late, in just an instant, countless Sin Army who couldn’t react and hadn’t formed a battle formation were vaporized, even their bones couldn’t be found, only some spirituality essence floated upwards!

Boom!

Boom!

Boom!

In the midst of a series of violent explosions, at the center of the foil-level killing devices, despite stepping into half-step taboo, the Roach Emperor was grievously injured beyond recognition, leaving only a skeleton!

Yet even that eerie green skeleton bore an imposing and arrogant manner, its vast sin True Intent burning like fire,

This made the Roach Emperor appear as a sinful war deity walking from destruction, his remaining battle instincts pushing his skeletal form headlong into the Sin Star Army, beginning a bloody slaughter.

At this moment, the Roach Emperor’s incisive actions responded to the Black Sun Star Lord’s recent overture!

With a backbone of pride, how could she kneel?

And seeing their queen in such a scene, all the Undying Cockroaches went utterly mad, burning their Essence of Life, forming a massive battle formation charged fearlessly at the Black Sun Star Army!

This earth-shaking turmoil alerted the four nearby military groups, whose commanders in their howling cries led part of the elite forces rushing to this battlefield.

Because they all knew, the Undying Cockroach Army Group had fought for over a thousand years, continuing such an immense war without cease, it may be exhausted soon!

Chapter 1955: Chapter 1955 - 1088: Quasi-Taboo Battle

"Kill!"

The commanders and elite aces of the four major military groups quickly reached this battlefield, and as soon as they entered, they felt a bloodthirsty aura that was intense to the point of brutality.

Yet even in this state, the Undying Cockroach Army Group still had a combat spirit that spread like wildfire, and even the remaining two hundred thousand ancestor-level military power showed a strength far beyond all the other major military groups.

This made these commanders have an indelible respect for the Roach Emperor and the Undying Cockroach Army Group.

No wonder it was appointed by the Wolf Lord as the strongest vassal town!

No wonder the Roach Emperor could add Six Honors, reigning above the other Three Emperors.

After all, such a brutal battle, unbearable to witness, already represented everything.

"Kill!"

The elite aces of the four rushing military groups hesitated not at all, directly waving the Star Sky Battle Flag, bringing the vast destiny into the battle group.

However, the Black Sun Constant Star Lord clearly anticipated reinforcements, and instantly the surrounding forty trillion Sin Army turned their direction to begin their crusade against the four major military groups.

Boom!

Boom!

With each thundering clash of the battle, all four elite aces couldn’t break through the war formations of these Sin Army, and instead, they were forced to retreat bit by bit.

"What’s happening? Are all the opponents the Roach Emperor has faced over these thousand years this abnormal? The battle formation is too tight, and the military power too strong! We can’t break through with just our elite!"

The Corpse Worm King, who previously had interactions and disputes with the Roach Emperor, felt the powerful iron-blooded Sin Army before him and also released such a surprised spiritual will.

It further recognized the gap between its own commanded Corpse Insect Clan and the Undying Cockroach Clan.

Perhaps they were once a dominant force in the entire Blazing Nebula, but now they’re merely a surviving bloodline, not even a tenth of the Undying Cockroach Army Group!

The commanders and war generals of the other major military groups also shouted out loud,

The Wolf Pack Civilization never cared about so-called face, if they couldn’t fight head-on, they would maneuver and harass—preserving strength was the true path.

"Humph! So aside from the Undying Cockroach, the Wolf Pack Civilization is just a bunch of scoundrels who can’t withstand a single blow!"

At this time, the Black Sun Constant Star Lord, having expended great energy to block the foil-level killing device, sensed the surrounding elite aces from the four military groups and sneered disdainfully.

After sneering, his mind moved, and out appeared his Extreme Heaven Realm Heavy Artifact—Sin Blade!

This is a long weapon with the true intent of endless Sin Star, capable of defying the heavens, altering the sky’s air flames.

The Black Sun Constant Star Lord directly threw it towards the Roach Emperor!

Splatter!

In an instant, it tore through space and shattered the Roach Emperor’s bones!

Despite that, the Roach Emperor’s skeleton still tried to break free, but was directly pinned to the spot by the vast might of this Sin Blade!

The Black Sun Constant Star Lord roared, leading his followers straight towards the battlefield of the remaining forces.

After all, having subdued the Roach Emperor, leaving twenty trillion Sin Army and thirty trillion vassal forces was more than enough to clear the Undying Cockroach Army Group,

He aimed to defeat the incoming military groups as quickly as possible.

Because the Black Sun Constant Star Lord knew that the Wolf Lord, who could make the Roach Emperor and the Undying Cockroach Army Group willingly submit, might possess even more remarkable means and prestige.

Even though he was extremely confident in the High Priest and Hidden Guard, the Black Sun Constant Star Lord was used to fighting with full force!

He wasted no more time and only wanted to quickly sweep away all enemies in this battle and then assist the High Priest!

Because their decisive battle with the Wolf Pack Civilization was never here, but rather over there with the High Priest and Wolf Lord!

If the High Priest were defeated, even if the Black Sun Constant Star Lord swept the Wolf Pack Civilization’s five major military groups, he would still have to retreat.

On one hand, these five major military groups are merely the vassal towns of the Wolf Pack Civilization and have not reached the point of completely breaking the Wolf Pack Civilization’s backbone.

On the other hand, an existence that can defeat the High Priest and thirty billion Heavenly Boundary Hidden Guards, the Black Sun Constant Star Lord cannot imagine how terrifying the Wolf Lord might be?

Even if unable to ascend to taboo power, it is likely not far off.

......

And as the bloody battle in the Southern starry sky of the Wolf Pack Civilization was reignited,

The Wolf Lord and that figure shrouded in a black robe had already pierced through space-time, reaching the Star Sky Barrier.

Su Lin never expected that traversing the starry sky alone would lead to such accurate ambush.

Because with his Divine Speed, it had reached a level where even taboo existences could not randomly deduce it,

At one moment he was in the Hundred Stars Alliance, and the next he might be hundreds of light-years away.

Ripping space-time, for a half-step taboo, was a norm.

For Su Lin, his speed already surpassed the Space-Time River, and he could even attempt to explore the future and past like a taboo existence along the Space-Time River.

Only within it contained the cause and effect that could destroy all living things, making Su Lin’s intuition shudder in fear, so he never touched this cause and effect.

Yet he never imagined that despite his unprecedented speed, he still fell into the encirclement’s trap.

Chapter 1956: Chapter 1956 - 1088: Quasi-taboo Battle
============================================================

"Awooo!"

Accompanied by a deafening Wolf Howl, the vast starry sky revealed the Sky Wolf Roar Sun Map, and this sound wave reached a level where it could shatter a star.

"Stop!"

However, even the sonic wave talent of the Extreme Heaven Realm was easily frozen in the starry sky by this black-robed figure, and all the energy immediately rebounded after a moment.

This prompted Su Lin to unleash the Life-taking Art, shattering everything, and engaging in close combat with the black-robed figure.

Both bodies were immensely strong, almost unparalleled,

Su Lin sensed that the opponent was following the atomic level self-certification path of a strongest being, as if it had once reached the forbidden level, with body strength terrifyingly unparalleled, especially those blood-red arms, clashing against his Celestial Wolf Wings, holding their own.

"Who are you? When did the Wangshu Zone have a powerhouse like you?"

Su Lin howled, the Twelve Color Celestial Wolf Body converged to an ultimate peak, and the four overwhelming forces on his body clashed with the powerhouse before him.

Kingdom "force," sinister "force," invincible "force," sinful "force"

These four forces were incredibly strong, drawn from exceptional opponents Su Lin had encountered, absorbed from them.

These four forces seemed to shake the heavens, smashing through small constant stars encountered along the way.

The battle strength between the two reached an almost inconceivable level, especially the physical body and vitality force, almost like two Star Dragons born at the dawn of the universe, shaking the stellar dome.

They frequently battled to the point of hitting cosmic barriers!

Su Lin was no longer the one who had just stepped into a half-step taboo, their bloody battle causing the cosmic barriers to crack,

Through these cracks, Su Lin seemed to see another starry cosmos, aside from this one!

There were even other versions of himself there!

But these images flashed and vanished, and Su Lin couldn’t truly break the cosmic barriers!

"Hahaha, you’ve risen too fast, you know too little. I’ve always been in the Wangshu Zone, even for more than an era, but I’m merely a failure, so no one in the Wangshu Zone would remember a failure!"

The black-robed figure emitted a mental will with a light laugh, seemingly self-mocking, also suggesting the Wolf Lord’s limited insight.

Yet it quickly realized Su Lin was very intrigued by the scenes beyond the cosmic barriers, so it continued, "It’s evident you’ve ascended too quickly, you’ve never even seen the basic starry realms beyond the cosmic barriers!"

"Hmph! You’ve seen much, but aren’t you still like a stray dog, hiding in this edge of the starry sky?"

Su Lin’s mental will was merciless, striking directly into the heart of the black-robed powerhouse.

Because he had already seen the numerical attributes and species of this black-robed powerhouse, surprisingly, it was a strongest from the Blazing Flame line!

It had broken the 200-level ceiling, reaching Level 206, meaning it survived the Heavenly Tribulation, at least quasi-taboo like the Illusion God.

They just lacked the Fate Altar!

The stray dog analogy from Su Lin’s mental will made the aura of the black-robed one falter before it flared up like a fire.

It spoke no more, revealing its killing moves to the fullest!

This strongest of the Blazing Flame Clan that had survived held not only an atomic level body but also top-tier Heavenly Boundary True Intent and Dimensional Truth.

At its move, Three Thousand Origin Rules resonated, evolving into a vast Red Cauldron plunging from the sky!

This Red Cauldron bore the blood-red divine light unique to the Blazing Flame Royal Family, once the clan’s heavy weapon, the Blazing Flame Cauldron!

In taboo heavy weapons, it was supreme,

Luckily, it was an evolved version, otherwise, even the Black Sun Clan and Heavenly Destiny Clan’s taboo beings would go to any length to seize it.

Even as an evolved form, it was terrorizingly unmatched, almost burning the Star Universe.

"Awooo!"

Su Lin howled, transforming his Celestial Wolf Wings into Star River Wings, channeling enormous Star Energy and Power of All Living Beings, shattering it.

And that wasn’t all; he leaped with Bewildering Step talent straight towards the black-robed powerhouse.

Boom!

Another great cataclysm!

The black-robed powerhouse blocked it, even an instant Space Secret Technique was intercepted.

Its combat talent and intuition were astonishing!

But even after blocking, Essence Blood still seeped from its arm.

"Heh, you were right; I’m like a stray dog, but even as a stray dog, I was once the absolute overlord of this realm, and you, a mere emerging fringe power, once didn’t even have the privilege to see me!"

The black-robed powerhouse was enraged, self-mocking as a pitiful being, a loser, only in relation to Blazing Flame Ink.

In reality, its pride and resentment were more extensive than the sea, vaster than the starry sky!

"Kill! Black Sun Clan, Heavenly Destiny Clan, they may be detestable but at least fought us Blazing Flame heads on, yet you opportunistic rebels deserve death!"

The Black Sun Constant Star Priest was utterly furious, displaying supreme force, holding a Heaven-Slaying Blade, a quasi-taboo level weapon far superior to the Star Sand Master’s.

This was once the signature war instrument of the Blazing Flame Clan!

With the quasi-taboo Heaven-Slaying Blade, its overpowering aura surged, stars and debris swirling in its intense field.

But Su Lin also shook off the Essence Blood from his Wolf Claw, countering, "You said it yourself, that’s the past, now you’re just a stray dog, and my Wolf Pack Civilization fought its way here, so you call me an opportunist as you please? What are the Blazing Flame Clan? Do you really think it’s your era to reign?"

The Wolf Lord’s cold, brutal, and truthful mental will further ignited the Black Sun Constant Star Priest’s fury, almost ablaze against all stars!

.....

The rest of the Wolf Clan, any White Wolf with exceptional battle achievements, whether Beta or Hai Wolf, received their deserved rewards, igniting an atmosphere akin to human New Year celebrations in the cave, with lively White Wolves hopping with excitement.

After rewarding the Wolf Clan, Su Lin turned his gaze to the Bear Clan accompanying him in battle, with the leading White Bear eager after witnessing the Wolf Clan receiving hundreds of pounds of flesh, eagerly anticipating their own rewards.

The Land of Adventure during Polar Day wasn’t easy for hunting; since the Ice Age, many Variants appeared, making predation even more challenging in the harsh Arctic, risking death under a predator’s fanged tooth for a few dozen pounds of flesh.

Many Bears chose to follow the White Wolves primarily for an ample flesh supply and better quality Variant Species Flesh.

Su Lin, of course, didn’t forget the Bears that fought alongside him, loudly howling again and distributing a lot of flesh to the Bear Clan.

The Bear Clan clustered together, having grown to understand White Wolf howls from living with the White Wolf Pack, happily roaring "hohoho" in the cave, this plentiful harvest strengthening their loyalty to the White Wolves.

Su Lin understood that this battle further solidified the tribe’s loyalty, thus being generous with rewarding his followers to garner a stronger sense of belonging, gradually strengthening the tribe over time until becoming the unchallengeable Arctic Overlord on the ice plain!

Concluding the rewards for the Wolf and Bear Clans, Sander and Tiffany only then caught Su Lin’s attention, having anticipated these humans would ally with the Wolf Clan for survival in battle.

"Buzz!"

"This is... the sword of Blazing Flame Ink, how can it be with you?"

The Black Sun Star Priest quickly recognized the Blazing Flame Sword among them!

Blazing Flame Ink was born when the Blazing Flame Clan was in decline, with barely any resources available for him,

so from the start, he abandoned creating his own heavy artifact, focusing all resources on himself.

However, the sword, due to being worn for a long time, had become sentient, and after drinking the blood of countless powerful opponents, it had grown into a quasi-taboo heavy artifact!

Su Lin offered no explanation, as once his true identity was fully recognized, there was nothing left to explain!

Since he stood on the "Unspeakable" side, he was destined to be natural enemies with the Blazing Flame Clan!

this time the opponent was far stronger than the Star Sand Master back then.

not only did they prove themselves at the atomic level, possessing vast atomic power,

How could there not be species aiming to walk multiple paths, simultaneously proving the taboo?

How did you create such a perfect battle body?"

After hundreds of rounds of battling each other again,

the Black Sun Star Priest’s eyes radiated a terrifying Divine Light, glaring at Su Lin intently.

Because he saw the path he once longed for!

It’s worth knowing that he and Blazing Flame Ink were the most outstanding prodigies of their generation in the Blazing Flame Clan, and his talent was even stronger than Blazing Flame Ink.

The existence of the Heavenly Forbidden Mountain had once said he wanted to take him as a disciple!

He originally wanted to dual-cultivate dimensional truth and atomic self-proofing, but who would have thought the two would conflict, causing his cultivation to stagnate for a long time.

But watching Blazing Flame Ink successfully prove the taboo, he couldn’t suppress his competitiveness, attempted to force self-proofing, but ultimately failed as the atomic body did not transform into a universe; he ended in failure.

If not for Blazing Flame Ink consuming a considerable amount of his Essence Blood and even personally withstanding the remaining Star Sky Thunder Tribulation for him, he might have perished long ago!

But now, this Wolf Lord before him had a path more diverse than his,

even with a re-paved Heavenly Boundary Path, such a road of no return!

Yet these three paths had no conflict in his body, merging perfectly together, and even the dominant paths of re-paving the Heavenly Boundary Path and atomic self-proofing did not vie for control of the body!

Instead, they coexisted like two tame kittens within one body!

"Aren’t you knowledgeable? Why ask me, or is the foundation of your Blazing Flame Clan just that?"

In Su Lin’s long howl, a supreme Life-taking Art transformed, and the Blazing Flame Sword, Inferno Heavenslayer, and Thirteen-colored Star Refining Furnace soared up, immobilizing the heavy weapons in the hands of the Black Sun Star Priest.

Indeed, his handling of the Heaven-Slaying Blade’s lethal power was far superior to Su Lin’s, his deep foundations and combat instincts, accumulated over such a long time, also surpassed Su Lin’s.

If not for Su Lin undergoing the harsh tempering of the Mysterious White Cloud with every advancement, he might have been thoroughly crushed in sheer combat experience!

Boom!

The Burning Universe Splitting Sky Technique reappeared, instantly igniting a stretch of the starry sky, unleashing overwhelming might upon the Black Sun Star Priest.

The Black Sun Star Priest was unmoved, his eyes emitted a shadow, a shadow that seemed capable of tracing the origin of anything, and when it shone on Su Lin, it forcibly restored the once-burning starry sky!

The power of the Burning Universe Splitting Sky Technique was depleted to the utmost.

Pfft!

The Black Sun Star Priest clashed directly with Su Lin, and unbelievably, punched through the four powerful "forces" on his body, shattering his wolf shoulder along with the Wolf Claw.

Chapter 1958: Chapter 1958 - 1089: Qing Ming Observes, Battle Blood Awakens
============================================================

Blood instantly flew three thousand miles, the twelve-colored divine blood streaked across the starry sky, appearing both dazzling and beautifully eerie.

Su Lin has begun to suffer injuries!

Because his combat experience and his ability to quickly recognize and counter various secret art talents are far inferior to those of the Black Sun Star Priest.

"Kill!"

Yet it was precisely this suppression that ignited the fury in the heart of the Wolf Lord, who risked injury to himself, revealing the Celestial Wolf Wings that tightly entangled the Black Sun Star Priest.

The two engaged in the most intense battle within a very small space.

Each strike met flesh, fists and claws reached bone, both possessing atomic-level self-proved bodies, unparalleled across the starry sky, and within half-step taboo, no one could match them.

Even the top-tier star sky physique was no match for them!

In the cramped space, the fight only meant exchanging injuries and lives, as higher combat awareness and instincts here rendered themselves useless.

"Wolf Lord, you’re out of tricks, aren’t you? You’ve walked three paths to taboo, yet this is all you have! You can’t exchange lives here, there are thirty billion Heavenly Boundary Hidden Guards, and you’ve become the biggest villain within the Wangshu Zone alongside the Red Sun Emperor, so you won’t survive! However, I’ll preserve your body, unravel its secrets, and use them to ascend the peak again!"

Facing the Wolf Lord’s desperate exchange of injuries, the Black Sun Star Priest showed no fear, his eyes filled with terrifying cold light.

He had absolute confidence!

For no one surpassed him within the same realm!

Even the former Blazing Flame Ink was not his match in the same realm, if not for the excessive complexity in his cultivation causing internal conflicts among various powers and pathways, trapping him for ages, perhaps he would have been the top figure of the previous era!

Certainly, he would have also died gloriously!

"Kill!"

Both sides fought with madness, occasionally revealing world-shocking secret art talents that reached the pinnacle of astonishment.

Su Lin fully utilized Heaven and Earth Grieve Together, Celestial Wolf Body and other techniques to ultimate levels, yet still could not completely suppress the Black Sun Star Priest.

For he too was a pride of heaven, with countless extraordinary secret art talents emerging continuously.

Each had a grand shadow behind them, swaying as if each was evolving divine charm through their secret techniques and talents.

Boom!

Once again exchanging injuries, they shattered each other’s bones,

Yet such wounds for them would heal in the blink of an eye.

At this time, Qing Ming, revealing top-secret intelligence, quietly arrived at the edge of the battlefield, observing and sensing from hundreds of billions of miles away.

For with the sensory abilities of the Wolf Lord and Black Sun Star Priest, getting too close would risk discovery even with stealth talents activated!

After all, they are peak powerhouses, practically standing under the taboo existence!

"When did the Wolf Lord’s body become so terrifying? Comparable to Chi Yanqian! He once attempted to self-prove taboo, and was partially reforged through Blazing Flame Ink’s essence blood!"

Qing Ming, feeling the chill from hundreds of billions of miles away from the battle,

could barely comprehend how the Wolf Lord chose the atomic-level body path, and even walked ahead of her!

The Wolf Lord was on the verge of truly touching the edge of self-proving taboo, merely one opportunity away from shattering his limits in a crossing tribulation!

This made Qing Ming feel an overwhelming sense of defeat.

When they first met, she was confident she could suppress the Wolf Lord.

Yet now, in just a few tens of thousands of years, even her most proud atomic-level path was far surpassed by the Wolf Lord.

"A variable! Truly, this is the biggest variable! Doesn’t the Squad Leader understand that? This type of variable must be exterminated quickly; otherwise, given resources, it will grow to unimaginable heights!"

Qing Ming mumbled in fear,

But she dared not consult the Squad Leader, for her actions now are indeed against the Squad Leader’s heavenly order.

Letting the Squad Leader know would lead to only one outcome—death!

Previously loyal to "Unspeakable", to the Squad Leader, Qing Ming’s mindset had long been rocked open by the ’Unspeakable’ super upheaval.

Even as she cursed the Wolf Lord for ignoring commands, she herself began distancing from "Unspeakable", seeking to dominate the Golden Sun Star and rule as king!

For in Qing Ming’s eyes, once she self-proves taboo, even the Squad Leader cannot command her!

Yet Qing Ming was unaware, that the tenth heaven ultimate peak atomic level was merely the starting point for integrating Blazing Flame Ink’s remaining body.

Hardly the threshold for self-proving taboo.

To self-prove taboo at the atomic level requires creating a single world out of a flower, a universe of a leaf, expanding every cell, connecting every vein, forging oneself into a miniature cosmos.

This is true atomic-level self-proving taboo!

Unaware of such paths, Qing Ming believed reaching the tenth heaven ultimate peak allowed her to seize the massive opportunity!

While Qing Ming secretly watched in surprise,

Su Lin and Chi Yanqian fought to a heated climax, both with essence blood dripping.

The atomic-level self-proof body’s strength ensured they both stood at the peak as before.

Particularly as Chi Yanqian utilized a second Extreme Heaven Realm Heavy Artifact, a Purple Gold Battle Armor!

Yet the Purple Gold Battle Armor was not for defense but to absorb the vast powers of the surrounding starry sky to replenish himself, enabling Chi Yanqian to fight longer.

Through countless clashes, Chi Yanqian realized it’s impossible to kill the ferocious wolf in a short time.

Even Chi Yanqian commanded the Hidden Guards to completely surround the Wolf Lord, beginning a rotation utilizing the Extreme Heaven Realm Battle Formation to exhaust and crush the Wolf Lord.

Not because Chi Yanqian believes he cannot kill the Wolf Lord, but because he prefers using advantages to crush opponents.

This difference distinguished Chi Yanqian from Blazing Flame Ink.

Chi Yanqian desires too much, covets too much, lacking courage and mindset to push through dire straits and extreme calamities.

Thus, he was destined to remain living an obscure life.

His talent once overwhelming an era, ultimately only stopped at this level, forever unable to reach taboo!

For every taboo existence is fated to possess a mindset to relentlessly forge ahead.

"Kill!"

Yet despite lacking true resolve and invincibility, Chi Yanqian relied on thirty billion Heavenly Boundary Hidden Guards to force the Wolf Lord into a near-death predicament.

Thirty billion divided into three battle formations, firmly imprisoning and suppressing the Wolf Lord in a triangular position.

Even if the Wolf Lord wanted to escape, he could not, the three battle formations disturbing the space-time continuum.

Su Lin himself was tightly controlled by Chi Yanqian, unable to use divine speed to tear open an escape route.

"Hahaha, the old dogs surviving in the Blazing Flame Clan, you don’t dare to fight me? So inferior, yet you speak of ruling the world? In my eyes, you aren’t noble and brilliant sovereigns but failed losers who refuse to admit defeat, prattling about past favors to the entire Star Nebula Force, trying to revive through others like hypocrites!"

Facing such dire encirclement, the ferocity within Su Lin’s eyes boiled ever more intensely,

He could feel the battle blood that had not awoken since "Nightmare" awakening and burning gradually.

Indeed, after "Nightmare", Su Lin hadn’t fully unleashed his might in battle.

Neither the Lord of the Radiant Sun, Star Sand Master, nor others had pushed him to fight with full effort!

Yet he remained puzzled, why do "Unspeakable" and the Blazing Flame Clan, sworn enemies, join forces against him?

And his exact location must have been revealed by "Unspeakable" through the invested mark to the Blazing Flame Clan remnants and this strong force of sinful Heavenly Boundary warriors.

He hadn’t yet eradicated the Bright Day System, nor dismantled the Blazing Flame Clan’s forces within the Wangshu Zone. Even if backstabbing was the intention, surely, this betrayal came too early!

Moments later, he ceased pondering, for Su Lin knew that the truth of all would emerge following this war’s end.

Because this Extreme Heaven Realm Secret Technique could summon the power of Dead Souls from the vast starry sky, nurturing a strike that could damage the Divine Soul.

Nor did he believe he would truly die here!

At the same time, the Power of the Star Energy and the Power of All Living Beings on Su Lin’s wolf body, bolstered by the Star River Wings, became radiant, rivaling the dimensional truth and atomic power.

For tens of thousands of years of restoration and recuperation, occupying eighty percent of the Wolf Pack Civilization’s growth time, wasn’t this the same for Su Lin?

Thus, his growth did not halt at the brief appearance of the fifteen-colored celestial wolf body!

Even after slaying the Lord of the Radiant Sun and merging into the Holy Angel Power, Su Lin achieved a sixteen-colored celestial wolf body,

In slaying the Star Sand Master, he ultimately forged the essence of its sin!

During these tens of thousands of years of restoration and recuperation, Su Lin finally fully integrated the dimensional truth and atomic-level power, once attempted in Earth’s era.

However, both the dimensional truth and atomic-level power were too domineering, only subdued by the Mysterious Devouring Power to prevent the celestial wolf body from shattering, greatly depleting Su Lin.

He never intended to reveal this, but since this Blazing Flame Royal Family claimed to know his cards,

Then let him understand more clearly!

"Want to see my cards? Fine! I’ll show you!"

This is the true invincible momentum after the Atomic Body has proven itself!

The Atomic Body evolved into a universe, bringing with it the ancient power of primordial chaos, capable of breaking all laws with sheer force.

The melee technique evolved, able to shatter any obstruction!

Even the pair of Celestial Wolf Wings on its Chaos Forbidden Body fully evolved into Star River Wings, seemingly carrying a galaxy world akin to a Mustard Seed Sumeru!

The Dimensional Truth also soared to the sky, carrying incomparable power!

This is the truly invincible spectacle after cultivating and proving the taboo in three ways at once!

"Impossible!"

Witnessing this, Chi Yanqian shouted in terror, unable to believe it was real!

Not daring to believe that the Wolf Lord’s secret technique could summon invincible battle power proving the taboo in three ways at once!

If true, wouldn’t it mean that just with the embryonic form of renewing the Heavenly Boundary Road in the late-stage semi-taboo, he can fiercely oppose the supreme taboo standing atop the Fate Altar?

Except for the Atomic Body that reached Great Achievement, the Wolf Lord’s other two paths were barely more than that!

But just as Chi Yanqian couldn’t believe, the Future Body and the Wolf Lord’s True Body instantly merged into one, rushing straight towards Chi Yanqian’s battle formation.

Boom!

Boom!

Boom!

Su Lin relentlessly slammed dozens of times, finally the battle formation, already severely damaged and on the verge of shattering, couldn’t withstand it any longer and completely collapsed!

Puff!

Puff!

Countless Sin Army blood and bone fragments shattered as well, the Divine Soul and Origin were severely damaged in this violent tremor, and the army closest was directly crushed into pools of blood essence.

And as Chi Yanqian reacted and tried to retreat, it was already too late!

He was tightly held by the throat by the Wolf Lord, whose eyes now held no semblance of grand strategy or calm, only bloodthirsty savagery like a great demon or Asura.

"Hahaha, coward! I’ve caught you!"

This was an intensely humiliating spiritual will!

Especially as the Wolf Lord held him like a dead dog in the starry sky when he uttered it!

This struck a severe blow to the pride and arrogance that Chi Yanqian held most dear,

Yet the Wolf Lord’s bloodthirsty and savage eyes, unlike any intelligent species, forcibly suppressed Chi Yanqian’s grief and anger.

He dared not utter any spiritual will to provoke this already-frenzied Wolf Lord, instead using the secret technique of the atomic-level body to instantly shatter into nothingness and remake elsewhere!

"Ah! Reconstruct the battle formation, stabilize the formation! His Future Body is absolutely not taboo power from mastering all three ways! Otherwise, we can’t withstand it! It’s merely superficial, lacking the overwhelming energy as a backing!"

After escaping, Chi Yanqian once again howled, launching an attack on the Wolf Lord!

But quickly, as an earth-shattering Wolf Howl followed, the starry sky governed by the Wolf Pack Civilization shook violently.

The Sea of Destiny from the Sky Wolf System’s base camp also felt the Wolf Lord’s summons, instantly transforming into tens of thousands of dragons traversing the starry sky, tearing through space and time to rush over!

Chi Yanqian also noticed this scene, he was always wary of the Wolf Lord leveraging overwhelming destiny.

So the three great battle formations disrupted the space-time and coordinates of this starry sky,

But with one formation fractured, they could no longer completely disrupt it!

This made Chi Yanqian feel an indescribable terror and fear, he didn’t know what level the already-beyond-his-understanding Wolf Lord would reach with the addition of vast destiny?

After all, this is still territory of the Wolf Pack Civilization!

And after several breaths, once the Sin Army reconstructed the formation amidst chaos, the star space once again resonated with a spiritual will seemingly from another dimension.

"Come! Let’s see if I have.....taboo power!"

.....

As for the remaining Variant Species Flesh, Su Lin will next carry out meritorious rewards, which is precisely the process all Wolf Clan members anticipate the most, for them, nothing is more important than food.

Several wolves stared longingly at the Variant Species Flesh in the distance, eyes filled with predatory glints, seemingly ready to unleash their nature and rush towards the flesh at Su Lin’s command.

Su Lin’s gaze turned to the two tall figures standing nearby, Xiao Hui, sensing the Wolf King’s imposing gaze, quickly stood at attention, while Little Lone Wolf stood respectfully beside him, pleasing Su Lin considerably.

Despite possessing immense power, Little Lone Wolf, the Lead Wolf, still held reverence for Su Lin.

Xiao Hui, with his typical lively nature, despite his evolved intelligence, still acted like an eight-year-old child, carefree, eager to follow Su Lin and spread the Wolf Clan’s prestige throughout the Arctic.

In recognition of the outstanding service of the two White Wolves that followed him, Su Lin generously rewarded them with three hundred pounds of flesh. The sudden reward made Xiao Hui howl with joy on the spot, while Little Lone Wolf, although he did not show it, let out an excited howl, signaling Su Lin the delight of the two White Wolves.

Other Wolf Clan members who participated in the battle and had commendable achievements, be they Beta Wolf or Hai Wolf, also received due rewards. Instantly, the entire cavern, much like a human New Year celebration, became lively; any spirited White Wolf who received a reward couldn’t help but leap and bound at this moment.

At this moment, the Wolf Lord, with tens of thousands of Fortune dragons pouring in behind him, seemed like the true Heavenly Destiny God.

Because the Wolf Lord is the master of the Wolf Pack Civilization, he possesses the ability to mobilize the greatest Fortune and Fate.

Under this terrifying amplification, even Su Lin did not know what level of combat power he had reached.

But he could feel that his combat power seemed to have transcended in this instant.

The previously formidable Chi Yanqian, in his eyes, became merely a newborn cub, not worth fearing.

Even thirty billion Heavenly Boundary Sin Army became a mountain of ants united together!

This ant mountain is heavy and sluggish; if he wishes, they could never touch him.

Most importantly, Su Lin felt he could directly confront this ant mountain.

You should know the first battle formation was shattered after Su Lin collided many times, weakened significantly, and finally at the burst of several Extreme Heaven Realm Secret Techniques!

But now, these two battle formations and the reformed formation no longer felt as indestructible to Su Lin as before!

"Wolf Lord... you... you..."

At this moment, Chi Yanqian wanted to throw harsh words,

but for some reason, feeling the overwhelming might akin to a taboo weighing down The World, he couldn’t speak.

What is a taboo?

Only that which suppresses billions of Starry Sky Clan and sweeps across the eight directions is called taboo!

A taboo can often make a common Star Nebula Great Clan bow down, as the means of taboo are countless.

But he never imagined the Wolf Lord before him had reached such a might.

Even if achieved under all sorts of buffs, he ultimately reached it!

A species not yet into the Forbidden Realm, yet possesses combat power to rival a taboo, in the entire Blazing Nebula, only the Ancestor did so before.

And even that is rumored and long untraceable.

But now there is a living example!

The Wolf Lord!

He has reached this combat power against the cosmos, and his three paths have not truly reached their peak.

The Wolf Lord’s dimensional path is merely at the late-stage Semi-taboo, and the renewal of the Heavenly Boundary path is but a prototype!

Doesn’t this mean the Wolf Lord has immense room for growth?

Upon realizing this fact, Chi Yanqian’s eyes filled with shock and terror increasingly,

because he had no idea the Wangshu Zone concealed such a world-shocking level super abnormality?

Considered the strongest enemy, the Red Sun Emperor, wasn’t as challenging.

Because many taboo entities have inferred about the Red Sun Emperor and suffered backlash, implying the Red Sun Emperor may have ascended to taboo,

but this time, during the Wangshu Zone battle, he was revealed as merely quasi-taboo!

Therefore, in Chi Yanqian’s eyes, he can no longer compare to the Wolf Lord.

Perhaps in this battle, the Wolf Lord and Wolf Pack Civilization are the stellar Ferocious Wolf emerging unexpectedly to dominate!

"Ah!!! I still don’t see it! Everyone do not waver, these are all Illusory Realm! Kill!"

But at this moment, Chi Yanqian still could hardly believe it was real.

Breaking free from this terrifying restraint, he roared, ordering three battle formations to continue encircling and killing the Wolf Lord!

Boom!

Just this time, the Wolf Lord with boundless Wolf Group Fortune and Fate, his Heaven and Earth Dharma Aspect could match the gods of the Extreme Heaven Realm battle formation.

With a thunderous strike, unexpectedly blocking ten billion Sin Army battle formations, even further, the Wolf Lord stretched out another wolf lord to confront another battle formation!

Instantly, the Stellar Dome shattered, the Cosmos seemed to face destruction.

The original Star Sky Barrier showed dense cracks, so large Su Lin could see the true images within.

That indeed was himself!

Except it wasn’t parallel time-space, nor parallel Cosmos, but an illusory realm simulated by the supreme Dimensional Truth.

But somehow, Su Lin truly felt his own cause and effect line within.

In that illusory realm was the image of his rebirth as the Arctic Wolf, only to be captured by a Hunter, becoming a house dog,

the image of his defeat in battle with the Purple Lynx,

also the image where Su Lin did not unify Earth, but attracted the attention of masterminds during the apocalyptic catastrophe and was taken to the Radiant Sun Star to be cultivated as a War General,

and many other bizarre images.

Such as after acquiring intelligence, entering humanity and becoming a Spirit Divine Beast,

or his birth becoming a Pride of Heaven on a Star Core, etc.,

In summary, there are countless possibilities on Su Lin’s life line,

including many beyond the life line!

Dimension is really too mysterious, casually viewing the dimensional Illusory Realm outside the Star Sky Barrier made Su Lin’s scalp tingle.

Because if these all have his cause and effect line, doesn’t it mean the entity behind the dimensional Illusory Realm could easily use these cause and effect lines to cast spells that drag and entangle him?

Even potentially suppress him with a flick using the cause and effect line.

Since having cause and effect represents having weaknesses, and with so many causes and weaknesses, it could bring down all strongest beings!

Perhaps this is the fundamental reason the Starry Sky Will limits all taboo existence.

"Kill!"

Meanwhile, another battle formation’s attack and Chi Yanqian’s attack also arrived.

Chapter 1965: Chapter 1965 - 1092: The Might of the Taboo, Qing Ming Stunned

Call Future Body!

This secret technique is indeed quite defying and excessive.

One could say it’s even stronger than the Chaotic Starry Sky created by Su Lin!

Because Call Future Body uses your current state as the basis!

The stronger you are, the stronger the Future Body summoned becomes. Even secret techniques, talents, etc., will spontaneously deduce and improve!

Therefore, whether it was himself back then, or the Star Sand Master, or Chi Yanqian, they were all shocked when they saw this secret technique!

Boom!

Su Lin also clawed and shattered the Black Sun Constant Star Priest into powder, only for the Atomic Level body to also be crushed and then reformed.

He was originally a master on this path, and with the secret techniques of the Blazing Flame Clan legacy of thousands, achieving such mastery with the Atomic Level body was also within reason.

Su Lin let out a long howl, recalling all of his mindset.

Now he must quickly end the battle; otherwise, mobilizing such a vast amount of fortune and fate from such a long distance is unimaginably consuming.

Even the current Wolf Pack Civilization couldn’t bear the burden,

So for this Black Sun Constant Star Priest to have forced him to such an extent, it’s already something to be proud of!

It was just that many times, this kind of mindset might help him avoid certain disasters but would also lose him many opportunities!

Because mobilizing fortune so immensely amounts to notifying the powerful Wolf Civilization Army; the Wolf Lord is here!

The Demon Breaking Formation Army was the same!

Feeling the vast fortune shifting, he also let out a long howl, recklessly consuming Qi-Blood and Origin Power, quickly urging the Space-Time Altar beneath his feet to change direction!

Because Desperate Evil Tiger had not only received great kindness from the Wolf Lord, but was also keenly aware of the importance of the Wolf Lord within the Wolf Pack Civilization!

If the Undead Cockroach Army Group and the four military groups failed, it’s no more than the Wolf Pack Civilization suffering severely,

But if the Wolf Lord encountered an accident, the Wolf Pack Civilization would be like having had its head chopped off.

Suffering severe wounds can still survive, but how can one live without a head?

Even the Sand Fox with some available power, upon sensing this agitation, directly withdrew all mobilizable military power from the Shadow Army Group, using the Space-Time Altar purchased from the Trading City at a low price over tens of thousands of years, traversing space directly heading here!

Meanwhile, the Illusion God sitting atop the Sea of Star Sand, upon seeing this scene, slowly opened his eyes and gazed towards here.

However, ultimately too far away, even a profound Illusion God couldn’t penetrate what was happening where the Wolf Lord was.

Because he believed that the Wolf Lord, who upon the Dimension Heart’s mere reformation could soar to Half-step Forbidden Peak or Quasi-taboo power!

That is a variable!

So among those who could contend with the current Wolf Lord, none within the Wangshu Zone dared see through other than that almost inscrutable Red Sun Emperor!

And hundreds of billions of miles away in Qing Ming, feeling the Wolf Lord who seemed already upon the Forbidden,

Her magically crafted eyes no longer held the previous coldness, only astonishment and shock!

"How is it possible? How can all this be possible? It’s all fake! He’s merely an ordinary beast emerging from a remote and impoverished planet; I investigated him, there’s absolutely no forbidden background behind him, so how can he cross the Heavenly Chasm, achieving such might with a mortal body?"

This heavenly princess who had been sponsored by "Unspeakable" for so many years without witnessing low-level bloodshed and sinister battles was also stagnant and murmuring to herself in disbelief.

..........

Su Lin scrutinized the Meng Hu in front of him, like a master on high surveying his captured slave, eyes filled with indifference.

"Aw—" Su Lin let out a low hum toward the Wolf Clan beside him, signaling the Wolf Clan to carry away this near-death, dying Siberia Tiger and then guard it well.

The surrounding Wolf Clan quickly reacted; several Wolf Clan members together dragged Meng Hu away, Meng Hu’s wounds dragged along the ground, chafing, and already ulcerated wounds bled again, a thin trail of blood extending from beneath Su Lin all the way out of the cave, seemingly endless.

Su Lin stared at this blood trail, his gaze as calm as still water in a pond without any fluctuations.

As for the remaining Variant Species Flesh, Su Lin would soon conduct a merit-based reward, which is precisely the process eagerly anticipated by all the Wolf Clan, as for them, nothing is more important than food.

Several Wolf Clan members began to covetously gaze at the Variant Species Flesh in the distance, eyes filled with aggressive light, seeming as if just awaiting Su Lin’s order they would liberate their nature, rushing toward those Variant Species Flesh.

How powerful must the species be to defeat the Mad Thunder Skyhawk with such shocking strength, and so brazenly carry its body towards the Land of Adventure.

Under the amazed eyes of the Predators, a White Wolf endowed with even greater power appeared. Its speed was so fast that the human eye was unable to capture it; only a blurred white shadow flickered by like a ghost with no trace, upon reopening their eyes, they saw White Wolf already standing high atop a distant hillside, howling skyward, leading the White Wolf Pack deep into the Arctic...

This scene left a deep impression in the hearts of many Predators, a memory likely to last their whole lives, forever recalling the silver-white silhouette of the White Wolf, never to be erased.

Panic and fear surged in Qing Ming’s heart, but she truly did not know what to do!

This made the complexity and fear in her eyes even more intense.

She stayed there because she still wanted to see how this ambush would conclude.

He wasn’t truly invincible nor invulnerable!

This means these founders and veterans, after establishing the Red Sun Empire, truly abandoned all fame and fortune, concealing their strength in secret cultivation.

The Red Sun Emperor is a hero; he cares not for false reputations, only practical substance!

Only relying on the battle formation of billions of Heavenly Boundary Death Warriors, clashing and suppressing the Red Sun Emperor repeatedly.

Because he rose from a small figure, sustaining injuries drives his unwillingness and pushes him to drag all opponents with him to death!

Chapter 1944: Chapter 1944 - 1082: Crimson Sun Bloodbath, Hundred Stars Encircle the Wolf Lord! (Part 2)
============================================================

....

At this moment,

Apart from the Red Sun Empire and the Bright Day System being engaged in the most intense and heated battle,

Su Lin and the Hundred Stars Alliance’s battle has also, over these hundreds of years, escalated to a level that shakes the starry sky, with a bloody aura filling the space!

The Great Army of Yangyang Star along with the elite forces of various Stellar Systems at both Quasi-Sky and Sky Realms are indeed formidable!

Over these centuries, they clashed multiple times head-on with the three main military groups of the Wolf Pack Civilization, and although they retreated each time, their formation remained intact, and their foundation was still solid!

Yet, in these hundreds of years, the Wolf Pack Civilization only managed to sweep five Stellar Systems and more than ten Small Constant Stars, but they lost the six Stellar Systems and more than twenty Small Constant Stars that they had originally subjugated.

In this light, the tables have turned!

In these hundreds of years, the Wolf Pack Civilization seems to have gained nothing significant; instead, they have exhausted the resources they had previously plundered.

But it was at this moment,

when everyone assumed the Wolf Pack Civilization’s defeat was inevitable and they were about to reap the bitter fruit,

even the Lord of Yangyang, filled with endless ambition, finally released the Hundred Stars Godslaying Army, which had been kept in hiding as the final lifeline of the Hundred Stars Alliance.

Because he wanted to orchestrate a super event big enough to shock the entire Wangshu Zone!

A trap to eliminate the Master of Heavenly Wolf!

Once the Wolf Lord was dead, all the crises would be resolved,

and the inherently chaotic Wolf Pack Civilization, with its military factions at odds, would inevitably fall apart without their strong Emperor.

By then, he would rally millions of billion troops from the Hundred Stars Alliance to conquer the Sky Wolf System.

To the south lies the Black Sun Stellar System, to the west the Void Abyss Mayfly Clan, and to the east himself; the Wolf Pack Civilization was destined to become history.

And he would achieve unparalleled merit, rising to become a significant figure in the Wangshu Zone.

At this time,

The Hundred Stars Godslaying Army was fully assembled.

A formidable force of 80 billion battle-hardened soldiers, secretly trained for an unknown duration, exhausting untold resources of the Hundred Stars Alliance.

They had even, at the invitation of the Sun Emperor, engaged in several deadly battles at the Star Core.

Now, this army quietly stood before the Lord of Yangyang.

This army was not entirely comprised of rumored elite Sky Realm forces; only over 20 billion were at the Sky Realm, while the rest were all at the Peak of the Quasi-Sky Realm!

Yet, even so, this was astonishingly impressive.

Because gathering over 20 billion Sky Realm forces requires an immense amount of resources.

For an alliance such as the Hundred Stars Alliance, with over a hundred factions cooperating, to contribute resources for such a great army was truly remarkable.

Only those who have managed a large force, especially an alliance, know how difficult this is.

Since they aren’t truly united, the fact that no single faction is solely pursuing their own interests is already a blessing!

Thus, the Hundred Stars Godslaying Army is like a legendary creation.

Equipped with full sets of Sky Realm armor, star energy weapons, and even a fleet of over twenty Star Sky Mother Ship Groups!

This is a truly invincible and heavily armed army!

Gazing upon such a powerful army, even the Lord of Yangyang could not suppress his pride, and after scrutinizing them, he roared: "Long time no see, you are all the elite heroes summoned from various Stellar Systems, since your formation, it’s been more than half an Era, originally established to fend off the Red Sun Empire, but now it seems we won’t need to use them against the Red Sun Empire,

as they have the Bright Day System to handle, but we’ve found ourselves a new opponent!

That opponent has slaughtered one-third of the Hundred Stars Alliance’s territories, refining many stellar systems into mere decorations on their wings, this enmity is irreconcilable!"

After the Lord of Yangyang’s spiritual will, the Hundred Stars Godslaying Army remained still, making no movement, only the heavy and murderous intent surging forward.

"So this hatred must be avenged, and in this battle, we may die! We may become another nameless heap of corpses in the starry sky, but the Hundred Stars Alliance has supported you for over an Era, now is the time for you to repay that time,

just thousands of billion miles away on the battlefield, the three main military groups of the Wolf Pack Civilization are all being held up, and that Demon Wolf Lord is alone for the first time, so I’m willing to personally lead the Hundred Stars Godslaying Army, taking the lead, to surround and kill... the Wolf Pack Civilization’s Master! I wonder.... will you dare to join me to earn this unparalleled merit?"

The gaze of the Lord of Yangyang became determined to the extreme,

And upon his second spiritual will, the entire Hundred Stars Godslaying Army voiced no slogans, no oaths, only responded with their killing intent soaring and the clamor of weapons clashing, bodies vibrating in unison!

Even among the reverberating sounds, there were many members of the Godslaying Army whose Home Planets had long been destroyed, their eyes burning with flames of vengeance!

Then,

Pausing for a moment longer, the Lord of Yangyang hesitated no more, and led this army, considered the strongest of the entire Hundred Stars Alliance, directly towards the starry sky where the Wolf Lord resided.

This was a spectacular gamble by the Hundred Stars Alliance, staking all its elite forces and trump cards,

If they lost, the Hundred Stars Alliance might be reduced to only one Yangyang Star,

If they won, then the Hundred Stars Alliance could leap forward, possibly replacing the position of the Wolf Pack Civilization, becoming the new New Star Dominator in the entire Wangshu Zone!

But just as this super trump card of the Hundred Stars Alliance finally surfaced,

A force that had remained hidden in the dark all along began to move slowly, undisturbed even by the Hundred Stars Alliance’s recapture of six Stellar Systems and over twenty Small Constant Stars, it flanked directly towards the Hundred Stars Godslaying Army.

This force was not large, even less than a tenth of the Hundred Stars Godslaying Army, but its aura seemed to dominate all stars, its battle spirit and morale nearly tangible, as if invincible!

......

Su Lin had the intention of cultivating the two humans before him to become his spokespersons, so when faced with these two humans, he also gave many rewards, distributing to Sander and Tiffany a full 200 pounds of flesh, enough for them to survive for some time.

This took Sander and Tiffany by surprise, but filled their hearts with gratitude towards the White Wolf, not expecting that by participating in the battle, they could receive so much food.

Sander couldn’t help but recall his days in the Human Fortress, where he was at the lowest social rung, being mocked and even humiliated was common, especially when human society was experiencing a scarcity of resources, with precious Variant Species Flesh reserved for the high rank or powerful New Humans, leaving bottom dwellers like him unable to partake, making his life now seem like the right choice compared to the past.

And Tiffany, in the Human Fortress, was merely a tool with some utility for the high ranks, similar to many of her peers who were as expendable as cannon fodder, with no rescue action from the Human Fortress since she and Sander had been in the Arctic, her heart had long turned cold, and now seeing that in the Wolf Clan, just contributing could earn fresh Variant Species Flesh, Tiffany and Sander both made a certain decision almost simultaneously.

Su Lin noticed the expressions of the two, their sentiments seemed genuine and it was exactly Su Lin’s intention, he could almost guess the disintegrated state of human civilization during the Ice Age, and with just small favors, he could gain their unwavering loyalty, a deal too good to pass up. His eyes shone with astonishment.

How powerful must a species be to defeat the Mad Thunder Skyhawk with such overwhelming strength, and brazenly carry its corpse towards the Land of Adventure.

Chapter 1945: Chapter 1945 - 1083: The Defeat of the Hundred Stars Alliance!
============================================================

Demon Breaking Formation Army!

The Demon Star Lord had been in power for so many years and only managed to create a force of merely several billion at the Heavenly Boundary Third Level.

This elite force was no less than the ace followers beside the Sun Emperor!

With the emergence of the Demon Breaking Formation Army, the battlefield of the Wolf Pack Civilization and Yangyang Star Great Army billions of kilometers away was also in full swing.

This time, the Yangyang Star Great Army would rather bet their lives than retreat.

This led Hao Ri Princess, Fox-tail Algae, Vulture King, and others to command their respective forces, planning to annihilate the Yangyang Star Great Army here completely.

"Good! Since they decided to fight us to the death! Then hold nothing back, all Sun Fire Army Group listen to my order, center on me to cut off this Yangyang Star force, then scatter and weaken them bit by bit, I want them to be unable to support each other, to bleed to death!"

Hao Ri Princess let out a long howl, taking on the most difficult part of this grand battle by herself!

Her Sun Fire Army Group, without any hesitation, directly used Hao Ri Princess as the spearhead, fiercely thrusting towards the Yangyang Star Great Army!

The Nightmare Army was also lurking beside the Yangyang Star Great Army, targeting to hunt entities above the Heavenly Venerate Level.

These entities were mostly commanders and war generals of various elite forces, hunting them could often influence millions of elite aces!

The Direct Lineage Second Division also formed a super battle formation, crashing towards them, making it impossible for their central forces to concentrate on resisting the Sun Fire Army Group.

For a time, the three main military groups of the Wolf Pack Civilization displayed their peak combat power, all besieging the Yangyang Star Great Army.

Even with a death wish, the Yangyang Star force, in the face of such casualties as if mowing the wheat, felt overmatched!

After a few dozen engagements, their formation began to falter, allowing the Wolf Pack Civilization to seize the opportunity and press hard on the unstable areas!

Besides, there was a relentless bombardment of foil-level killing devices.

Especially Su Lin casually threw out two Forbidden-level Foil Weapons, which caused the Yangyang Star Great Army to completely collapse with a bang, also being successfully cut off by the Sun Fire Army Group.

"Ah!!! Wolf Pack Civilization, do you dare to fight us openly and squarely? Do you only dare to rely on the power of foil paper?"

At this time, many Yangyang Star war generals attempted to provoke the Wolf Pack Civilization, hoping to force a direct confrontation.

But it was completely useless.

Over these centuries, the eight hundred foil-level range weapons Su Lin issued to Hao Ri Princess and Fox-tail Algae exploded here mercilessly.

Boom!

Boom!

Boom!

Waves of massive energy storms also erupted on this starry sky battlefield.

Many Yangyang Star forces were torn to shreds before even having a chance to resist.

Such is the cruel and ruthless nature of war.

The so-called head-on bloody fight only exists when neither side has any Star Energy Weapon or foil paper weapon advantage.

And upon witnessing such an endless series of tricks and weapons from the Wolf Pack Civilization, the Yangyang Star Great Army and Hundred Stars Alliance saw the reality clearly.

Even if their combined size was already no less than that of a Star Nebula Great Clan, they lacked the foundation a Great Clan should have.

Such a number of foil-level killing devices was something they dared not even dream of.

After all, the entire Hundred Stars Alliance only had the Lord of Yangyang as a Half-step Taboo, and in the Dark Starry Sky, few small factions dared to venture far,

what’s more, even if they could reach the Star Core, how many resources could they produce to purchase these consumable weapons?

"Ah!!! Brothers, hold them off! With our lives, hold them off! I believe the Lord of Yangyang and Hundred Stars Godslaying Army will avenge us!"

Amidst the roars of many Yangyang war generals, many forces relied on battle formations to withstand round after round of bombardment,

but after each bombardment, what awaited them was another round of encirclement by the three major military groups.

Such tactics seem exceedingly old-fashioned, yet their survival through the vast starry sky proves they are one of the most effective tactics on the frontline!

In this incessant bombing by foil-level killing devices and indirect assault by the three major military groups, although the Yangyang Great Army had some defense-type foil paper killing devices, they were quickly exhausted!

But the Yangyang Great Army ultimately numbered nearly twenty trillion, even at such a disadvantage, they continued to resist desperately.

Because in their hearts, the Lord of Yangyang and Hundred Stars Godslaying Army upheld their spirit.

Only the Hundred Stars Godslaying Army, which was supposed to appear within several years, had never shown up.

This bloody battle had dragged on for over a hundred years.

Across these hundred-plus years, the Yangyang Great Army went from united together to disheartened and then to utter despair!

Because no one knew why the Hundred Stars Godslaying Army and the Lord of Yangyang hadn’t arrived, it felt as though they had been abandoned.

This made those originally filled with the will to die become incredibly confused.

And in such brutal clashes, the slightest change in morale and military spirit could greatly affect the battlefield situation.

So over these hundred-plus years, the Yangyang Great Army was nearly always in a dire disadvantage, where even resisting was a luxury, only able to huddle and mount a passive defense on survival instinct.

Some even, unable to see hope or the future, finally couldn’t hold back any longer and directly defected to the Wolf Pack Civilization.

Chapter 1946: Chapter 1946 - 1083: The Hundred Stars Alliance Defeated! (Part 2)
============================================================

"Woo woo woo, Lord of Yangyang, where are you all?"

There were also some war generals who let out mournful cries, but the response from the Wolf Pack Civilization was only their iron-blooded slaughter.

In just a few more decades, the entire Flame Sun Army was utterly defeated, unable to hold any line of defense.

Out of nearly twenty trillion forces, a full ten trillion perished in battle, and the rest all fled in panic.

But fleeing without the protection of the battle formation was no different from pigs waiting to be slaughtered.

"Kill! All the resources we seize are ours! We’ve given so much, it’s time to start getting rewards!"

Radiant Sun Princess howled at the forefront of the charge.

The iron-blooded intent for slaughter on her body grew heavier, and her combat power became increasingly formidable!

Over nearly two thousand years of brutal fighting, she broke through another small threshold, reaching the late stage of the Tenth Heaven.

A Holy Angel at the late stage of the Tenth Heaven was not inferior in the slightest to the Black Sun Commander of the Nightmare Army.

So in terms of combat power, military achievements, and prestige, Radiant Sun Princess was increasingly becoming a new banner within the Wolf Pack Civilization.

In the bloody battle at the Sea of Star Sand, Radiant Sun Princess understood the meaning of using all means available, breaking the enemy’s morale and overseeing the grand strategy!

And so in this battle, Radiant Sun Princess also learned what it truly meant to fight a brutal and fierce battle on the battlefield!

Perhaps the entire Wangshu Zone thought the Hundred Stars Alliance was weak to the core, incapable of a single strike!

But being able to stand until today in the crevices between the giant Red Sun Empire and the Bright Day System explained a lot.

Radiant Sun Princess witnessed with her own eyes the determination of the Flame Sun Army and the elite aces of the Hundred Stars Alliance to take down a member of the Wolf Pack Civilization, even in death, and she saw those war generals and war kings go into battle without fear, courageously sacrificing themselves.

If not for the loss of morale and fighting spirit during the later stages, these elite aces of the Hundred Stars Alliance couldn’t have been taken so easily!

"Kill! Lord of Yangyang and the so-called Hundred Stars Godslaying Army cannot come to save you! Surrender now, and you will not be killed!"

The Radiant Sun Princess also employed psychological warfare in her howling!

This caused many of the fleeing great armies to waver!

Some hesitant forces, even without fully submitting, were immediately beheaded by the three main military groups!

Only a few elite of the Hundred Stars Alliance, who had long been unable to hold on, instantly knelt and bowed, thereby preserving their lives!

For within the Wolf Pack Civilization, under the repeated orders and emphasis of the Wolf Lord, surrendered troops and captives were not to be killed.

At this moment, with some wavering in mind kneeling and bowing, it would quickly spread from one to another.

After all, they had already lost their morale, fighting spirit, and so-called noble beliefs and spiritual pillars!

But just when the Flame Sun Army and the Hundred Stars Alliance were utterly collapsing, having lost all will to fight and beginning to kneel down like dogs to save their lives,

An army with a tint of endless blood appeared on the edge of this battlefield.

A Star Sky Battle Flag flew above it, etched with soul patterns!

Hundred Stars Godslaying Army!

At the forefront was none other than the Lord of Yangyang.

At this moment, the Lord of Yangyang was covered in blood and horrific injuries, his half-step taboo aura unsteady.

Just as the Lord of Yangyang entered, he shouted hoarsely: "Ah!!! We’ve been tricked! Retreat! Everyone retreat! Head to Yangyang Star! Don’t lose your morale and spirit, don’t disperse the battle formation!"

But despite the Lord of Yangyang’s desperate shouts, he did not cause any significant stir.

And with grave injuries, the Lord of Yangyang finally saw the details of the battlefield clearly!

With just a glance, he felt his heart quiver, his divine soul hum, and blood tears streamed uncontrollably from his eyes.

He saw his once-proud Flame Sun Army and all the elite aces of the Hundred Stars Alliance being slaughtered by the Wolf Pack Civilization like pigs,

If not, they would kneel and become groveling dogs of the Wolf Pack Civilization!

"We were too late! We were too late! But we too were ambushed by the elite forces of the Wolf Pack Civilization! It was all a trap set by the Wolf Pack Civilization, and we fell for it!"

At this moment, the war generals of the Hundred Stars Godslaying Army beside the Lord of Yangyang, seeing this scene, also cried out with heartache.

Just as the Lord of Yangyang and the Hundred Stars Godslaying Army had not been advancing for long, they were ambushed by an elite force of terrifying combat power.

That elite force was entirely composed of beings at the Third Heaven of the Heavenly Boundary and Quasi-Sovereigns, and nearly millions of them were donned in Star Energy Mechas, and their battle formations and tactics were the top of the top.

Such military strength was considered elite among elites, aces among aces, in the Star Core.

They did not know how they appeared here?

They also didn’t understand how such a terrifying force existed within a power like the Wolf Pack Civilization, which had only been around for tens of thousands of years!

But just as this elite appeared and caused a river of blood, both the Lord of Yangyang and the Hundred Stars Godslaying Army knew they had been duped!

It seemed the Wolf Pack Civilization had long intended to eliminate all the elite aces of the Hundred Stars Alliance!

Because once these elite aces were taken down, the Wolf Pack Civilization could sweep across and eliminate all stars and small stars except for Yangyang Star without any further hindrance!

"The Wolf Pack Civilization is too insidious, they’re too insidious!"

After hundreds of years, losing as much as ninety percent of their forces, the Hundred Stars Godslaying Army and the Lord of Yangyang, trying to salvage the situation, only felt extreme heartache at the sight before them.

For as far as the eye could see, all of the original Flame Sun military forces and elites of the Hundred Stars Alliance were either numb, grieving, or in visible pain, shedding blood tears as they looked at them.

But now, no military force charged towards the Lord of Yangyang with the united determination once seen!

Because they were already a group beaten to fear, a battleground that lost its morale, its fighting spirit, and even the love and faith for their home planet!

In fact, they weren’t even considered routed soldiers anymore, they were simply a group willing to serve as dogs to the enemies who destroyed their homes, their homeland, just to survive!

At this point where the grand situation was already collapsed, what meaning did the arrival of the Lord of Yangyang and the Hundred Stars Godslaying Army hold?

"Hahaha! Do you see? Even the savior in your hearts has come to die like a defeated dog! Hahaha!"

And although Radiant Sun Princess, Fox-tail Algae, Vulture King, and Black Rat did not understand why the Lord of Yangyang and the rumored almighty Hundred Stars Godslaying Army ended up in such a miserable state, they all knew the Hundred Stars Alliance was beyond saving!

This battle marked a complete victory for the Wolf Pack Civilization!

After nearly two thousand years, such an extended war victory would inevitably bring about such arrogant, rampant, and cheerful, excited laughter among these top commanders of the Wolf Pack Civilization.

This aggressive and excited laughter, however, formed the sharpest contrast with the spirit of sadness among these defeated dogs of the Hundred Stars Alliance.

......

Su Lin’s gaze turned to the two towering figures standing nearby, and Xiao Hui, feeling the imposing gaze of their Wolf King, quickly stood tall, while the Little Lone Wolf always stood with respectful eyes and bowed his head, which satisfied Su Lin greatly.

Even as the Lead Wolf, the Little Lone Wolf carried great power, but still faced Su Lin with awe.

Xiao Hui, as usual, remained carefree with his lively nature, so even with evolved intelligence, he still behaved like an eight-year-old child without worries, only thinking of following Su Lin to fight across lands and spreading the Wolf Clan’s dignity throughout the Arctic.

With the two White Wolves that continued to follow him and had made great contributions in this battle, Su Lin did not hesitate to reward them with three hundred pounds of blood meat. This sudden generous reward made Xiao Hui howl in excitement, jumping for joy in place, while the Little Lone Wolf, although not showing it outwardly, let out an excited howl that told Su Lin how extremely joyful they were.

All other members of the Wolf Clan, as long as they participated in the battle and their achievements were outstanding, regardless if they were Beta Wolf or Hài Wolf, also received the appropriate rewards. For a moment, the entire cave, much like a human celebration of a new year, became lively with festive atmosphere.
